Beginner's Luck.name: Beginner's Luck
Beginner's Luck.description:
Frequency once per day

Trigger You fail a skill check using a skill that you're untrained in

Effect Reroll the triggering check and use the better result.

Focus Senses.name: Focus Senses
Focus Senses.description: You gain echolocation (precise) 30 feet until the end of your next turn.

Recall Knowledge.name: 回忆知识 Recall Knowledge
Recall Knowledge.description:
你尝试进行技能检定来回想起与该技能主题相关的一些知识。向GM提议你想使用的技能，并向其询问一个问题。GM会决定DC的数值。你可能需要与GM就如何缩小问题和技能的范围来达成一致，如果可供选择的范围不如你意，你也可以决定在采取行动之前取消回忆知识。

大成功 你准确回忆到了相关知识。GM会如实回答你的问题，接着要么告诉你额外信息或背景，要么再回答一个后续问题。

成功 你准确回忆到了相关知识。GM会如实回答你的问题。

大失败 你回忆到了不正确的信息。GM会告诉你一个错误答案（或者决定不提供任何信息给你，类似失败）。

Treat Wounds.name: 治疗伤势 Treat Wounds
Treat Wounds.description:
Requirements You're wearing or holding a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.s1vB3HdXjMigYAnY]{medkit}.

You spend 10 minutes treating one injured living creature (targeting yourself, if you so choose). The target is then temporarily @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Lb4q2bBAgxamtix5]{immune} to Treat Wounds actions for 1 hour, but this interval overlaps with the time you spent treating (so a patient can be treated once per hour, not once per 70 minutes).

The Medicine check DC is usually 15, though the GM might adjust it based on the circumstances, such as treating a patient outside in a storm, or treating magically cursed wounds. If you're an expert in Medicine, you can instead attempt a DC 20 check to increase the Hit Points regained by 10; if you're a master of Medicine, you can instead attempt a DC 30 check to increase the Hit Points regained by 30; and if you're legendary, you can instead attempt a DC 40 check to increase the Hit Points regained by 50. The damage dealt on a critical failure remains the same.

If you succeed at your check, you can continue treating the target to grant additional healing. If you treat it for a total of 1 hour, double the Hit Points it regains from Treat Wounds.

The result of your Medicine check determines how many Hit Points the target regains.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.macros.Macro.6duZj0Ygiqv712rq]{Treat Wounds}

Critical Success The target regains [[/r 4d8[healing] #Treat Wounds]] Hit Points and loses the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} condition.

Success The target regains [[/r 2d8[healing] #Treat Wounds]] Hit Points, and loses the wounded condition.

Critical Failure The target takes [[/r 1d8[damage] #Treat Wounds (Critical Failure)]] damage.

Into Position!.name: Into Position!
Into Position!.description:
You call on allies to get out of a threat's area or close on a threat. Select an enemy within 60 feet. Allies within the target's reach can Step as a reaction. Allies within 30 feet of you and not adjacent to the target can Stride as a reaction but must end closer to the target.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, Strike the target to focus their attention on you. The target takes a –1 circumstance penalty on attacks made against other creatures until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.K0hYQZcHLRa3GdfK]{Effect: Into Position! (Lead by Example)}

Sense Motive.name: 察言观色 Sense Motive
Sense Motive.description:
你尝试辨明目标的行为是否反常。选择一个生物，评估目标的肢体语言、紧张情绪小动作、其它目标进行欺骗尝试的信号行为等等。GM为你进行一次秘密[[/act sense-motive]]检定，将检定结果和目标的欺骗DC、隐藏目标心理活动的法术DC、其它GM认为合适的DC进行比较。通常若情形没有得到明显的改变，你就无法对同一个生物持续尝试察言观色。

大成功 你得知目标真实的意图，能确定是否有心智魔法正影响着目标。

成功 你能辨明目标行为是否反常，但你无法得知其真实意图，也无法确定目标是否受魔法影响。

失败 你判断到了目标想让你相信的事。若目标没有进行欺骗，你会相信目标的行为是正常的。

大失败 你完全错判了目标的意图。

Tumble Through.name: 翻滚 Tumble Through
Tumble Through.description:
你至多行走你速度的距离。在这次移动的过程中，你可以尝试穿越一个敌人占据的空间。进行[[/act tumble-through]]检定对抗你试图穿越敌人的反射DC。你可以在适当环境中使用攀爬、飞行、游泳或其他动作替代行走来进行翻滚。

成功 你在敌人占据的空间中移动，将其空间所处的方格视为困难地形（每移动5尺消耗10尺移动力）。如果你没有足够的速度在该空间中移动，则视为失败。

失败 你结束移动，如同你离开自己开始移动的方格一样触发反应动作。

Retraining.name: 重训 Retraining
Retraining.description:
重训提供了一种调整角色选择的方式，当你想要把角色引导至新的方向或者认为之前作出的选择未能达到自身期待时十分有用。你能重训专长、技能以及部分可选的职业特性。你无法重训角色的族裔、传承、背景、职业或属性。你无法在重训时执行其他休整行动。

重训通常需要你耗费时间去向老师学习，无论是进行体能训练、在图书馆学习、还是一同陷入神游的魔法冥想。由你的GM是否能够得到合适的训练或者某些内容是否能够被重训。在某些情况下，你需要向指导者支付佣金。有些能力可能很难甚至无法被重训（举例说明，女巫只有在极端特殊的情况下才能够重训庇护主）。

在重训中选择想要重训的原选项时，你会经常遇到无法选择该选项（进行重训）的情况。举例说明，你不能把你2级时学的技能专长和4级的技能专长交换，或者你选择的原专长在被获取时还未满足某个选项所要求的先决条件。若你不记得想要重训的某个选项在原本选取时是否满足新选项的先决条件，则可以询问GM让她决定。若由于你进行重训而导致角色不再满足某个能力的先决条件的话，你就无法在此情况下使用该能力。为了获取所有你想要的新能力，你可能需要逐次依序重训数个能力才能达成。

专长 Feats

你能花费1星期的休整模式时间来重训，用于更换角色的一个专长。移除旧专长并用相同类型的其他专长进行替换。举例说明：你能将技能专长更换为另一个技能专长，但是无法把它换成法师专长。

技能 Skills

你能花费1星期的休整模式时间来重训，用于更换角色的一次技能提升。让失去技能提升的技能熟练度下降一阶，并让另一个技能的熟练度提升一阶。新熟练度必须与你转移的熟练度相同或更低。举例说明：若你的吟游诗人在表演和隐秘上都是大师熟练度，神秘是专家，你能够将隐秘的熟练度降到专家，让神秘变为大师，但是你不能把技能提升分配到表演上把表演变为传奇熟练度。当你重新分配技能提升时请注意角色的等级；你的技能熟练度发生改变的等级会影响‘重训带有技能熟练度的专长’的能力。

你还能够花费1星期时间来重训一项在创建角色期间获得的初始受训技能。

职业特性 Class Features

你能够重训需要进行选择的职业特性，用不同的选项来替换它。比如替换一个你法术库力的法术需要一周。GM会告诉你像德鲁伊教派或是法术学派这样的较大重训需要多久，通常至少要一个月。

Pick a Lock.name: 开锁 Pick a Lock
Pick a Lock.description:
Requirements You're holding or wearing an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.coJUVZGcuVg3FoYh]{infiltrator's toolkit}.

Opening a lock without a key is very similar to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disabling a Device}, but the DC of the check is determined by the complexity and construction of the lock you are attempting to pick. Locks of higher quality might require multiple successes to unlock. If you lack the proper tools, the GM might let you use improvised picks, which are treated as a shoddy toolkit.

Critical Success You unlock the lock, or you achieve two successes toward opening a lock that requires more than one success. You leave no trace of your tampering.

Success You open the lock, or you achieve one success toward opening a lock that requires more than one success. You leave behind damage that indicates the lock was picked on close scrutiny.

Critical Failure You break your toolkit and leave behind obvious damage. Fixing a broken toolkit requires using Crafting to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{Repair} it or else swapping in @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.F0SYGfqJatyyxl79]{replacement picks} (costing 3 credits, or 30 credits for a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.hsk3weQS9I7LyGkn]{tactical infiltrator's toolkit}).

High Jump.name: 跳高 High Jump
High Jump.description:
你行走一次，然后进行DC30的[[/act high-jump]]检定尝试垂直跳跃。如果你行走的距离不超过10尺，那么自动失败。GM可以根据自己判断决定增加或减少DC。

大成功 你至多能垂直@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}8尺，水平跳跃10尺。

成功 你至多能垂直跳跃5尺，水平跳跃5尺。

失败 你正常跳跃。

大失败 你在自己占据的空间里@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

Demoralize.name: 挫败士气 Demoralize
Demoralize.description:
你突然发出一声呐喊、一句恰到好处的嘲弄或是一句尖刻的讽刺，就有可能动摇敌人的决心。选择一个距离你30尺以内的生物。进行[[/act demoralize]]检定对抗目标的意志DC。如果目标听不懂你说的语言，或者你不使用任何语言，你就会受到-4的环境减值。无论结果如何，目标在10分钟内都暂时免疫你的挫败士气。

大成功 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}。

成功 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}。

Quantum Pulse.name: Quantum Pulse
Quantum Pulse.description:
Trigger You roll initiative.

You're always ready to let loose with your paradoxical abilities, and when imperiled, you instinctively release a pulse of quantum energy. As combat begins, you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{Warp Reality}.

Change Shape.name: 化形 Change Shape
Change Shape.description: 你变化成自然形态，或按照动作来源的描述获得一种新形态。

Sustain.name: 维持 Sustain
Sustain.description:
选择一个持续时间为维持，或者列出了维持时会获得特殊增益的效果。大多数类似效果来自法术或激活魔法物品。如果该效果的持续时间为维持，它的持续时间会延长到你的下一回合结束（在同一回合维持一次以上不会继续延长持续时间）。如果一项能力可以维持，但没有列出持续时间，则最多可以维持10分钟。

一项效果可能会列出你维持它时才会获得的额外增益，这种情况有可能出现在持续时间不为维持效果上。如果该效果具有特殊增益且持续时间为维持，那么你的维持动作会延长持续时间并获得特殊增益。

如果你的维持动作被打断，该能力结束。

Attune.name: Attune
Attune.description:
Frequency once per round

You steady your body and mind and attune yourself to the stellar aspect of your choice. You become attuned to photon or graviton. You can also manifest any of your solar manifestations if they're currently dormant and if you have the free hands to use them.

Special In addition to the above usage, you can also Attune as a free action when you roll initiative.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{Effect: Solar Weapon}

Grab an Edge.name: 抓住边缘 Grab an Edge
Grab an Edge.description:
触发 你处于坠落中时经过一个边缘或把手。

需求你的手没有被拘束在背后或处于受缚状态中。

当坠落时的你经过一个边缘或把手时，你可以尝试抓住它，阻止自己的坠落。你必须在特技或反射（由你选择）豁免检定上成功，使用攀爬DC。当你抓住边缘或把手后，后续可用运动技能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{Climb}上去。

大成功 无论你是否有自由手，你都抓住了边缘或把手，典型的比如用持握的物品挂住了你自己（例如战斧卡在了横栏上）。你仍然会受到已坠落距离带来的伤害，但坠落距离视为减少30尺来计算。

成功 若你至少有一只自由手，你抓住了边缘或把手，阻止了坠落。你仍然会受到已坠落距离带来的伤害，但坠落距离视为减少20尺来计算。若你没有自由手，你会如同检定失败一般继续坠落。

大失败 你继续坠落，坠落距离相比使用该反应动作前视为增加20尺来计算，且该次坠落中你每坠落20尺会受到10点钝击伤害。

Subsist.name: 求生 Subsist
Subsist.description:
You try to provide food and shelter for yourself, and possibly others as well, with a standard of living. This typically uses [[/act subsist statistic=society]]{Society} if you're in a settlement or [[/act subsist statistic=survival]]{Survival} if you're in the wild. The GM determines the DC based on the nature of the place where you're trying to Subsist. You might need a minimum proficiency rank to Subsist in particularly strange environments. Unlike most downtime activities, you can Subsist after 8 hours or less of exploration, but if you do, you take a –5 penalty.

Sample Subsist Tasks

  • Untrained forage on a lush planet with calm weather like Castrovel or panhandle at a busy space port with plentiful resources like Absalom Station
  • Trained forage on a habitable terrestrial planet, adequately supplied research station, or city
  • Expert forage in extreme terrain, subsist in an insular frontier colony, or stowaway on a long-haul freighter
  • Master forage on a desert moon or abandoned space station
  • Legendary subsist on a barren asteroid, toxic or irradiated planet, or a city undergoing orbital bombardment

Critical Success You either provide a subsistence living for yourself and one additional creature, or you improve your own food and shelter, granting yourself a comfortable living.

Success You find enough food and shelter with basic protection from the elements to provide you a subsistence living.

Failure You're exposed to the elements and don't get enough food, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} until you attain sufficient food and shelter.

Critical Failure You attract trouble, eat something you shouldn't, or otherwise worsen your situation. You take a –2 circumstance penalty to checks to Subsist for 1 week. You don't find any food at all; if you don't have any stored up, you're in danger of starving or dying of thirst if you continue failing.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.wHWWHkjDXmJl4Ia6]{Effect: Adverse Subsist Situation}

Digital Assessment!.name: Digital Assessment!
Digital Assessment!.description:
A quick check of your records and local infospheres lets you quickly disseminate information to your allies. Choose a creature within 100 feet and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about the target. When you succeed at identifying your target with Recall Knowledge, you note a resistance or immunity in the creature's defenses in addition to any other benefits.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, you Strike the target. You and your allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against attacks made by the target until the start of your next turn. If the target has the tech trait, it must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:envoy|options:inflicts:glitching] save against your class DC. On a failure, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}. The target is then immune to Digital Assessment for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.2Iuhg4udP9eQF3oM]{Effect: Digital Assessment!}

Influence.name: 影响 Influence
Influence.description:
你试图获取NPC的好印象，或说服他支持你的目标。指定一个NPC，并进行技能检定来影响之。检定的DC以及成功的可能性，随该NPC的偏好而定（一般会记述在NPC的影响属性表中）。

大成功 你获得该NPC的2点影响力点数。

成功 你获得该NPC的1点影响力点数。

失败 你不获得该NPC的影响力点数。

大失败 你失去该NPC的1点影响力点数。

Auto-Fire.name: Auto-Fire
Auto-Fire.description: You attempt to hit each creature in a cone with a range equal to half the weapon's range increment without making an attack roll. Any creature in the area takes weapon damage (@Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save against your class DC plus the tracking value of the weapon). This damage is area damage. Creatures that critically fail this save are subject to effects that occur on a critical hit with this weapon, including the weapon's critical specialization effect. Auto-Fire has an expend equal to the number of targets in the area × 2.

Puff Up.name: Puff Up
Puff Up.description:
Frequency once per hour

Trigger A creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapples} you, hits you with an unarmed Strike, or hits you with a non-reach melee weapon

Effect You take a deep breath and rapidly puff up your body, jabbing your spurred scales and ridges into your attacker. You deal @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[piercing]] damage to the triggering creature (@Check[reflex|basic|against:class-spell]). On a critical failure, the creature is additionally thrown off by your sudden transformation, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of your next turn. At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, this damage increases by 1d6.

Stunt.name: Stunt
Stunt.description:
You perform a stunt while Driving your vehicle, temporarily improving its effective capabilities at the risk of losing control. Drive your vehicle and choose a stunt. All Piloting checks attempted as part of your Stunt receive the listed penalty, including Piloting checks made to take a reckless action. If the Drive action and Stunt are both reckless, you must attempt the Piloting check to keep control of the vehicle twice.

StuntPenaltyBenefit
Back Off–1Move half Speed backwards.
Evade–1Move half Speed to gain a +1 status bonus to AC.
Flip and Burn–1Move half Speed, then turn any direction.
Barrel Roll–2Move half Speed to gain a +2 status bonus to AC.
Flyby–2Move half Speed through an enemy square.
Drift–2Move half Speed sideways without turning.
Turn in Place–2Turn, then move full Speed.

Shove.name: 推撞 Shove
Shove.description:
需求 你至少有一只空闲手，目标的体型不超过你一级以上。

你将一个生物从你身边推开。进行[[/act shove]]{运动}检定对抗目标的强韧DC。

大成功 你成功将目标推撞至10尺外。你可以立刻跟随它行走，但必须在同一方向上移动相同的距离。

成功 你成功将目标推撞至5尺外。你可以立刻跟随它行走，但必须在同一方向上移动相同的距离。

大失败 你失去平衡，坠落且在落地时@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

Forge Credentials.name: Forge Credentials
Forge Credentials.description:
You prepare a fake ID, license, or other credential that might serve as a convincing prop. Attempt a hard or very hard Society check or a very hard Computers check.

Success You create convincing credentials and gain 1 EP you can use only when presenting some form of credential or form of identification.

Failure Your phony credentials have a glaring problem. You gain 1 EP that (unknown to you) grants no benefit when used.

Critical Failure As failure, but a PC who tries to use the Edge Point gets a critical failure, even if they use the Edge Point after rolling a failure.

Coordinated Ambush!.name: Coordinated Ambush!
Coordinated Ambush!.description:
With perfect timing, you call on hidden allies to take down an unsuspecting target. Designate an enemy creature within 60 feet and an ally within 60 feet. If the ally is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{Unnoticed} to the target at the start of their turn, they treat the target as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the end of their turn instead of when they become visible to the target.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}. Until the start of your next turn, you can Strike the enemy target as a reaction the first time the ally you targeted attacks your designated enemy.

Holo-Roger.name: Holo-Roger
Holo-Roger.description:
Trigger You roll initiative

Effect Your ship's fearsome holo-flag projects above you, lasting 1 minute. Attempt an Intimidation check to [[/act demoralize]] one enemy within 30 feet that can see your flag. While your flag is projected on a starship, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Intimidation checks to Demoralize.

Redirect Energy.name: Redirect Energy
Redirect Energy.description:
Trigger You take cold damage or fire damage and are holding a melee weapon

Effect You tap into the harmful energy directed at you and redirect its essence into a melee weapon you're holding. Until the end of your next turn, the selected weapon deals an additional 1d4 damage of the triggering damage type. During this time, you lose any resistance to the triggering damage type granted to you by Perfectly Balanced.

Stop.name: 停止 Stop
Stop.description:
需求 你是移动中载具的驾驶员。

你使载具停止。

Delay.name: 延迟 Delay
Delay.description:
触发 你的回合开始。

你等待更好的行动时机。你的回合剩下的部分不再进行。同时，你会从先攻条中移出。你可以用一个自由动作使自己返回先攻条中，触发为任一生物的回合结束。这会永久性地将你的先攻改变至新的位置。在你返回先攻条前，你无法使用反应动作。若你延迟了一整轮而没有返回先攻条，延迟回合保留的动作会全部失去，先攻不会改变，按照你在先攻条中的位置开始新的回合。

延迟时，所有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.lDVqvLKA6eF3Df60]{持续伤害} 和负面效果正常在你原本使用延迟的回合的开始和结束时发生。任何会在你的回合中终止的正面效果也会正常终止。GM能裁决什么效果会在你延迟时正常终止。总而言之，你无法依靠延迟来延迟负面效果发生的时点，也无法延续正面效果在你回合结束后依然存在。

Impersonate.name: 乔装 Impersonate
Impersonate.description:
You create a disguise to pass yourself off as someone or something you are not. Assembling a convincing disguise takes 10 minutes and requires a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.Jvp0x2Sc82WVpExT]{holoskin}, but a simpler, quicker disguise might do the job if you're not trying to imitate a specific individual, at the GM's discretion.

In most cases, creatures have a chance to detect your deception only if they use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} action to attempt Perception checks against your Deception DC. If you attempt to directly interact with someone while disguised, the GM rolls a secret [[/act impersonate]]{Deception} check for you against that creature's Perception DC instead.

If you're disguised as a specific individual, the GM might give creatures you interact with a circumstance bonus based on how well they know the person you're imitating, or the GM might roll a secret Deception check even if you aren't directly interacting with others.

Success You trick the creature into thinking you're the person you're disguised as. You might have to attempt a new check if your behavior changes.

Failure The creature can tell you're not who you claim to be.

Critical Failure The creature can tell you're not who you claim to be, and it recognizes you if it would know you without a disguise.

Dismiss.name: 解消 Dismiss
Dismiss.description: 你使一个你能够解消的效果结束。除非另有说明，否则解消会使整个效果结束。

Gossip.name: 闲言碎语 Gossip
Gossip.description:
你打听有关渗透目标的谣言。尝试一次普通，困难或非常困难的交涉检定。

大成功 你获得了你想要尝试渗透的地点或群体的内部信息。你在之后为渗透进行准备行动的检定上获得+2环境加值。如果你共享信息，那么被分享者也获得此加值。

成功 你获得了你想要尝试渗透的地点或群体的内部信息，这有助于你进行计划。

失败 你一无所获。

大失败 你听到了一些错误的谣言，你下一个准备行动所尝试的检定承受-2环境减值。流言在你追问的群体或个人周围散播，你的警觉点提升1点。

Stride.name: 行走 Stride
Stride.description: 你移动至多等于速度的距离。

Seek.name: 搜索 Seek
Seek.description:
你搜索一块区域中的生物或物体，甚至还包括暗门或危害。选择要搜索的区域。由GM决定一次搜索动作可以搜索的区域——通常是全维度30尺或更短的距离。如果你搜索离自己很远的区域，GM可能会给与你减值，或者如果你搜索一处特别杂乱的区域，GM可能会调整所需的动作数量。

GM为你暗骰一次[[/act seek]]检定，将结果与该区域内任何@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}生物的隐秘DC进行比较，或者设置一个能侦测到该区域内所有物体的DC（由GM或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.qVNVSmsgpKFGk9hV]{Concealing the Object}的人决定）。如果你使用模糊感官进行搜索，或者某种效果（例如@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed}）使目标无法被观察到，那么你侦测到的生物可能会保持藏匿状态，而非@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}。

大成功 所有你对其大成功的无踪或藏匿的生物都会对你变为可见。你得知自己大成功对抗的区域中的物体位置。

成功 所有你对其成功的无踪生物对你变为藏匿而非可见，所有你对其成功的藏匿生物对你变为可见。你能够得知该区域任何物体的位置或者获得有关其下落的线索，具体由GM决定。

Request.name: 请求 Request
Request.description:
你可以向一个对你态度友善或乐于帮助的生物提出请求。考虑到目标目前对你的态度，你需要以他们能接受的方式进行请求。GM会根据请求的难度设置[[/act request]]的DC。有些请求会令人生厌或者不可能完成，即便一个对你乐于帮助的NPC也绝不会同意。

大成功 目标无条件同意你的请求。

成功 目标同意你的请求，但他们可能会要求附加条件或修改请求内容。

失败 目标拒绝请求，但他们有可能会提出一个不那么极端的替代方案。

大失败 目标不但拒绝了请求，而且你提出请求时的冒失行为使他们对你的态度降低了一级。

Disarm.name: 卸武 Disarm
Disarm.description:
需求 你至少有一只空闲手，目标的体型不超过你一级以上。

你试图击落一个生物手中的物品。进行[[/act disarm]]检定对抗目标的反射DC。

大成功 你将该物品从目标手中击落。它会掉落在目标占据空间的地面上。

成功 你削弱了目标对该物品的握持力。进一步尝试卸武该目标手中的该物品将获得+2环境加值，目标使用该物品攻击或其他需要抓牢该物品的检定将受到-2环境减值。该生物可以使用交互动作改变持握方式来结束该效果，否则只要该生物持有该物品，效果就会持续存在。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.PuDS0DEq0CnaSIFV]{Effect: Disarm (Success)}

大失败 你失去平衡，直到你的下一个回合开始前陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

Isolated Spell Matrix.name: Isolated Spell Matrix
Isolated Spell Matrix.description: If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that has a range, increase the spell's range to 100 feet. That spell only affects targets inside your quantum field, and the area of the spell doesn't extend beyond your quantum field.

Track.name: 追踪 Track
Track.description:
你可以以一半的旅行速度移动来追寻踪迹，使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.DUOb8QrlC5t0adkL]{Travel Speed}规则。如果追踪的掷骰成功，你可以继续以半速追寻踪迹，在1小时内无需额外进行检定。

一些情况下，你可能需要在遭遇中进行追踪。此时你的追踪是一个单动作，不具有探索特征，但由于情况紧急，所以你可能需要更频繁地掷骰。GM会决定你进行检定的频率。

当你开始追踪时，你需要进行[[/act track]]检定，每隔一小时或者踪迹出现明显变化的时候重新追踪一次。GM会根据踪迹的新鲜程度、天气和地面材质决定该检定的DC。

范例追踪情景·

  • 未受训 沿着道路行进的军队留下的踪迹
  • 受训 一头熊在平原上横冲直撞留下的相对较新的痕迹
  • 专家 一只敏捷的黑豹穿过丛林，但被雨水遮挡住了的踪迹
  • 大师 被冬雪遮盖的痕迹，老鼠或体型更小的生物留下的痕迹，或者光秃的岩石这类难以留下痕迹的表面上的踪迹
  • 传奇 风沙肆虐的沙漠中的旧踪迹，被大暴雪或飓风遮挡住的痕迹

成功 你成功追寻到了踪迹，或者能够继续追踪之前跟随的踪迹。

失败 你跟丢了，但可以在1小时后重新尝试。

大失败 你跟丢了，24小时内无法重试。

Perform.name: 演出 Perform
Perform.description:
When making a brief performance-one song, a quick dance, or a few jokes-you use the Perform action. This action is most useful when you want to prove your capability or impress someone quickly. Performing rarely has an impact on its own, but it might influence the DCs of subsequent Diplomacy checks against the observers, or even change their attitudes if the GM sees fit.

Performance

Additional Traits

[[/act perform variant=acting]]{Act or perform comedy}

Auditory, linguistic, and visual

[[/act perform variant=dance]]{Dance}

Move and visual

[[/act perform variant=keyboards]]{Play an instrument}

Auditory and manipulate

[[/act perform variant=oratory]]{Orate or sing}

Auditory and linguistic

Critical Success Your performance impresses the observers, and they're likely to share stories of your ability.

Success You prove yourself, and observers appreciate the quality of your performance.

Failure Your performance falls flat.

Critical Failure You demonstrate only incompetence.

Sample Perform Tasks

  • Untrained casual audience
  • Trained audience of corporate professionals
  • Expert audience of wealthy influencers
  • Master audience of discerning industry pros
  • Legendary audience of planetary leaders

Scout Location.name: 侦查地点 Scout Location
Scout Location.description:
你花时间观察想要渗透的地点或团体。尝试一个普通，困难或非常困难的察觉、社群或隐秘检定。

成功 你的观察提供1EP。

失败 你没有观察到任何值得值得注意的东西。

大失败 你对你观察到的某些方面产生了误判。获得1点使用时会造成大失败而不是成功的EP，即使角色是在骰出失败后使用这点EP。

Investigate.name: 调查 Investigate
Investigate.description: 你在以半速移动的同时，从周遭环境中搜集信息。你会对自身在旅途中有过接触或能够看到的各种事物使用回忆知识并从中发现线索，但这是个秘密检定（Secret Checks）。你能够在调查中使用具有回忆知识动作的任意技能，但你能找到的线索是否与该技能相关是由GM判定的。

Push Off.name: Push Off
Push Off.description:
Requirements You have at least one hand or leg (or suitable appendage) free, and you're untethered.

You use as leverage an object or creature of the same size as you or larger to change the direction you're floating in. Float up to half your Speed in your chosen direction. The distance you move at the end of your turn while untethered changes to the amount you moved during this action.

You can Push Off as a free action immediately after you make a successful melee Strike or successfully @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}.

Create a Diversion.name: 分神 Create a Diversion
Create a Diversion.description:
通过一个[[/act create-a-diversion variant=gesture]]{手势}、[[/act create-a-diversion variant=trick]]{花招}或者一些[[/act create-a-diversion variant=distracting-words]]{令人分心的话语}，你可以让一个生物分神，将其注意力吸引到其他地方。如果你使用姿势或花招，这个动作会获得操作特征。如果你使用令人分心的话语，则该动作获得听觉和语言特征。

进行一次欺骗检定，与你试图转移其注意力的生物的察觉DC进行比较。无论你是否成功，该生物在接下来的1分钟时间里对抗你使其分神的察觉DC都会获得+4环境加值。对抗你要使其分神的生物的察觉DC。无论你这次检定是否成功，在接下来的1分钟时间内，你继续该生物在对抗你使其分神的察觉DC上获得+4环境加值。

成功 对于察觉DC小于等于你检定结果的生物，你视为进入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}状态（你可以在藏匿状态@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}），效果持续到你的回合结束，或者你进行了任何除快步或者使用隐秘技能躲藏或潜行之外的任何动作。如果你对一个生物使用打击，该生物对该次攻击视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，然后重新视你为可见。如果你进行了其他动作，除非GM另有决定，否则你会在行动之前就会变为可见状态。

失败 你没能转移任何察觉DC大于等于你的生物的注意力，这些生物会知道你试图欺骗他们。

Burrow.name: 掘地 Burrow
Burrow.description:
需求 你拥有掘地速度。

你在泥地、沙地或类似软性地面中掘地前进，最多移动等于你掘地速度的距离。你无法掘地穿越岩石地面或类似比泥地更密实的地面，除非你有能力允许你在这种地面下掘地前进。

Aid.name: 协助 Aid
Aid.description:
触发 一位盟友将要使用一个需要技能检定或攻击骰的动作。

需求 该盟友自愿接受你的协助，你已经做好协助的准备（见下）

你尝试进行协助。若想使用该反应动作，你必须先做好协助的准备，通常需要你在自己的回合内使用一个动作。你必须向GM描述你是如何进行协助尝试的，GM需要裁决你是否能协助到你的盟友。

当你使用协助反应动作时，按GM要求进行对应的技能检定或攻击骰。DC通常为15，GM可以根据目标任务难易度调整DC。根据情形，GM可以为你的准备动作或你的协助反应动作添加合适的特征词，甚至能允许你协助并非技能检定和攻击骰的任务。

大成功 你的盟友在触发检定上获得+2环境加值。若你在自己尝试的检定上熟练度为大师，你给与盟友的加值为+3。若你为传奇，则给与的加值为+4。

成功 你的盟友在触发检定上获得+1环境加值。

大失败 你的盟友在触发检定上获得-1环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.AHMUpMbaVkZ5A1KX]{效果：协助}

Search Infosphere.name: Search Infosphere
Search Infosphere.description:
You search digitally for any information about the infiltration's target. Attempt a normal, hard, or very hard Computers check.

Critical Success You find rare information and gain 1 EP that requires the use of a tech item. If you share this information, anyone you share it with can use that EP (but once used by anyone, it's no longer useful).

Success As critical success, except the information is so well-known that attempting to use it might arouse suspicion and adds 1 AP to the infiltration.

Failure As success, except the information is exaggerated, outdated, or just wrong, and the EP grants no benefit to the infiltration, which can be revealed by the GM at any point during the infiltration, as befits the story.

Critical Failure As failure, but adding 2 AP to the infiltration.

Avoid Notice.name: 避人耳目 Avoid Notice
Avoid Notice.description: 你尝试[[/act avoid-notice]]{隐秘}检定来避开他人的注意，并以半速进行旅行。若你在开始一次遭遇时正处于避人耳目期间，则通常先要投掷一次隐秘检定来取代察觉检定，并以此来判断你的先攻以及敌人是否注意到了你（基于对方的察觉DC，就如同正常的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}判定一般，此判断忽略对方的先攻结果）。

Bribe Contact.name: 贿赂联络人 Bribe Contact
Bribe Contact.description:
开销 贿赂的价值最少为基于等级的团队财富表中每个额外PC货币列中金额的1/10。将金额加倍会在检定上获得+2环境加值。

需求 你已成功获得一个联系人。

你向联络人行贿，并让他以某种方式为渗透提供帮助。尝试一次困难或非常困难的欺骗或交涉检定。

成功 联络人接受了贿赂，你获得1EP。

失败 你认为你成功贿赂了联络人，并获得1EP。但实际上该联系人将未遂的贿赂告诉了敌方，从而为渗透行动增加了1AP。只要满足故事的需要，GM可以在渗透行动中的任意时刻透露此EP无法获得好处。

大失败 如同失败，但增加2AP。

Implant Augmentation.name: Implant Augmentation
Implant Augmentation.description:
Prerequisites master in Medicine or Augmentation Specialist

Requirements You have a medkit.

You safely implant or remove an augmentation on a willing creature. This takes 1 hour per item level of the augmentation if using a medkit or half the normal amount of time if you have access to a hospital or medical facility. Most shops that sell augmentations have staff willing to perform the surgery as part of the cost and are experienced enough that they can perform the surgery in 10 minutes per item level instead of 1 hour per item level. This activity can be performed in downtime mode, in which case it loses the exploration trait and gains the downtime trait.

Discover.name: 刺探 Discover
Discover.description:
你观察或研究NPC，试图发掘目标的偏好。指定一个NPC，并进行察觉检定或GM认为适当的技能检定来刺探之。检定的DC一般会记述在NPC的影响属性表中。

大成功 从成功的选项中选择两个条目。你可选择同个条目两次，来获得两个同类的情报。

成功 从下列选项中选择一个条目：你发掘可用以影响该NPC的技能中，检定DC最低的一个项目（忽略已知的技能）；该NPC的一个成见；该NPC的一个抗力；该NPC的一个弱点。

失败 你不获得该NPC的任何情报。

大失败 如同成功一般选择一个条目，但获得错误的情报。例如误以为该NPC有抗力的吹捧为弱点。

Long Jump.name: 跳远 Long Jump
Long Jump.description:
你行走一次，然后进行DC15的[[/act long-jump]]检定尝试朝你行走的方向跳远。如果你行走的距离不超过10尺，那么该检定自动失败。GM可以根据自己判断决定增加或减少DC。

成功 你至多能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}过等于你的检定结果向下取整到5尺的倍数的距离。你跳跃的距离无法超过自己的陆地移动速度。

失败 你进行了一次正常的水平跳跃。

大失败 你进行了一次正常的水平跳跃，然后坠落且在落地时@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

Ghost Tap.name: Ghost Tap
Ghost Tap.description:
Requirements Your last action this round was a successful Strike against a target you were @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} from or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} by.

You throw an object, activate a hidden flare, or take some other action while your target is still disoriented from your attack. Attempt a @Check[deception|against:will] check against the Will DC of the target of your last Strike; on a success, you're hidden from the target or undetected on a critical success.

Hustle.name: 飞奔 Hustle
Hustle.description: 你竭力以自身旅行速度的两倍进行移动。你能够强行军的分钟数等同于你的体质调整值 x 10（最低10分钟）。若你们组成队伍来进行强行军的话，则使用其中最低体质调整值的人来判断该队伍能够一同以多快的速度来进行强行军。

Line Up the Shot.name: Line Up the Shot
Line Up the Shot.description:
Requirements You are wielding a ranged weapon

Effect You take your time to line up the perfect shot with a required weapon, unharried by your surroundings. Until the end of your turn or your next attack (whichever comes first), double the range of the required weapon you're wielding. This does not apply to Area Fire and Auto-Fire attacks.

Reactive Strike.name: 反应打击 Reactive Strike
Reactive Strike.description:
触发 你触及范围内的一个生物使用操作或移动动作，进行远程攻击，或者使用移动动作时离开一个方格。

你攻击露出破绽的敌人。对触发此动作的目标进行一次近战打击。如果该攻击为重击，并且触发此动作的是一个操作动作，则打断此动作。这次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，你的多重攻击减值也不应用于此次打击。

Treat Poison.name: 治疗中毒 Treat Poison
Treat Poison.description:
Requirements You're wearing or holding a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.s1vB3HdXjMigYAnY]{medkit}

You treat a patient to prevent the spread of poison. Attempt a [[/act treat-poison]]{Medicine} check against the poison's DC. After you attempt to Treat a Poison for a creature, you can't try again until after the next time that creature attempts a save against the poison.

Critical Success You grant the creature a +4 circumstance bonus to its next saving throw against the poison.

Success You grant the creature a +2 circumstance bonus to its next saving throw against the poison.

Critical Failure Your efforts cause the creature to take a −2 circumstance penalty to its next save against the poison.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.1FrAlPeNseApVrX3]{Effect: Treat Poison}

Plot Course.name: Plot Course
Plot Course.description:
You prepare for a longer journey into the stars, likely making use of your starship's Drift Engine (or similar FTL device). Attempt a Piloting check to determine if you can chart a suitable path to your ultimate destination. The GM determines how long this activity takes and the DC (GM Core).

Critical Success You manage to reach your destination in half the expected time (minimum 1 day).

Success You create a usable navigational plan that gets you to your intended destination on time.

Failure Your plan has several problems, and you end up reaching your destination late.

Critical Failure You arrive in an unfamiliar star system, requiring you to plot a new course to your destination (likely at an increased DC due to the unfamiliar starting point).

Balance.name: 保持平衡 Balance
Balance.description:
Requirements You are in a square that contains a narrow surface, uneven ground, or another similar feature.

You move across a narrow surface or uneven ground, attempting an [[/act balance]]{Acrobatics} check against its Balance DC. You are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} while on a narrow surface or uneven ground.

Critical Success You move up to your Speed.

Success You move up to your Speed, treating it as difficult terrain (every 5 feet costs 10 feet of movement).

Failure You must remain stationary to keep your balance (wasting the action) or you fall. If you fall, your turn ends.

Critical Failure You fall and your turn ends.

Sample Balance Tasks

  • Untrained tangled cables, narrow catwalk
  • Trained steel beam
  • Expert skyscraper ledge
  • Master taut cable, smooth sheet of ice
  • Legendary razor's edge, asteroids falling midair

Administer First Aid.name: 急救 Administer First Aid
Administer First Aid.description:
Requirements You're wearing or holding a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.s1vB3HdXjMigYAnY]{medkit}.

You perform first aid on an adjacent creature that is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.lDVqvLKA6eF3Df60]{Bleeding}. If a creature is both dying and bleeding, choose which ailment you're trying to treat before you roll. You can Administer First Aid again to attempt to remedy the other effect.

  • Stabilize Attempt a [[/act administer-first-aid variant=stabilize]]{Medicine} check on a creature that has 0 Hit Points and the dying condition. The DC is equal to 5 + that creature's recovery roll DC (typically 15 + its dying value).
  • Stop Bleeding Attempt a [[/act administer-first-aid variant=stop-bleeding]]{Medicine} check on a creature that is taking persistent bleed damage. The DC is usually the DC of the effect that caused the bleed.

Success If you're trying to stabilize, the target loses the dying condition (but remains @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}). If you're trying to stop bleeding, the target benefits from an assisted recovery with the lowered DC for particularly appropriate help.

Critical Failure If you were trying to stabilize, the target's dying value increases by 1. If you were trying to stop bleeding, the target immediately takes an amount of damage equal to its persistent bleed damage.

Gain Contact.name: 获取联络人 Gain Contact
Gain Contact.description:
你尝试与能够在渗透行动中帮助你的个人建立联系。尝试一个普通，困难或非常困难的交涉或社群检定，或者与潜在联络人相适应的学识检定。

成功 你成功建立了联系并获得1EP。

失败 你无法建立联系。

大失败 你以某种方式侮辱或欺骗了联系人。之后的尝试会承受-2环境减值。

特殊 多次大失败可能会造成该联系人在某种程度上与队伍发生冲突，这可能会造成队伍的警觉点增加。

Silver Tongue.name: Silver Tongue
Silver Tongue.description:
Frequency once per day per skill

Trigger You roll a skill check for any of the following skills you're legendary in: Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, or your leadership skill.

You can reroll the triggering skill check and use the better result.

Manifest Energy Wings.name: Manifest Energy Wings
Manifest Energy Wings.description:
Requirements you are in a vacuum

Effect You manifest your energy wings, gaining a fly Speed equal to your land Speed plus 10 feet. These wings allow you to fly through a vacuum. Your energy wings remain manifested for as long as you are in a vacuum, or until you choose to disperse them as a single action.

Repeat a Spell.name: 复唱法术 Repeat a Spell
Repeat a Spell.description: 你在以半速行进的同时，反复施放相同的法术。通常来说，该法术是个戏法，你希望在战斗爆发之时获得该法术的效果，且施放该法术必须只使用2个或更少的动作。当你执行复唱法术时，如果复唱的是需要作出复杂判定的法术，比如@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{Figment}，则根据GM的判断，可以判定你陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}。

Refocus.name: 再聚能 Refocus
Refocus.description:
需求 你具有聚能池。

你花费10分钟的工作来回复你的魔法链接。这会回复你的聚能池中1聚能点。所需做的工作会在赋予你聚能法术的职业或者能力中列出。这些工作通常可以和其他与你的聚能法术来源相关的任务结合。例如，一个从圣洁神祇获得聚能法术的牧师通常可以在照料盟友的伤口时再聚能。

Make an Impression.name: 建立印象 Make an Impression
Make an Impression.description:
你在至少1分钟的谈话中通过用魅力示好、恭维奉承或是其他善意行为来试图给某人留下好印象，让他们暂时感到愉快。在对话结束时，进行[[/act make-an-impression]]检定对抗目标的意志DC。你可以最多选择5个目标，但要承受-2的减值。GM可能会根据情况增加其他加值或减值。除非GM另有决定，否则你给他人留下的任何印象都只会持续到当前的社交互动结束。

大成功 目标对你的态度提高两级。

成功 目标对你的态度提高一级。

大失败 目标对你的态度降低一级。

改变态度 Changing Attitudes

你对NPC的影响由态度衡量，这也体现了他们如何看待你的角色。当然这也只是对这个生物个性的简要总结。GM会根据与你互动角色的历史和信仰引入一些细微差别，这些角色的态度可能会随着故事推进而变化。状态附录中详细说明了各种态度的含义，这里也会对其简要总结。

  • 乐于帮助 Helpful： 愿意帮助你，会积极回应你的请求。
  • 友善 Friendly： 对你态度很好，但不一定会主动上门来帮助你。
  • 不关心 Indifferent： 你或好或坏他都不在乎。（大多数NPC的起始态度为不关心。）
  • 不友善 Unfriendly： 不喜欢你，也不愿意帮助你。
  • 敌对 Hostile： 会积极反对你，可能仅仅因为不喜欢就攻击你。

用这些技能无法改变玩家的态度。你可以与玩家角色进行角色扮演互动，如果玩家愿意，你也可以使用交涉掷骰的结果让他们对一个角色的说服力或魅力有个大致了解，但玩家会对自己角色的反应做出最终决定。

Borrow an Arcane Spell.name: 借阅奥术法术 Borrow an Arcane Spell
Borrow an Arcane Spell.description:
如果你是一名奥术准备施法者，你就可以从别人的奥术法术书中、奥术女巫的魔宠身上，或用其他类似事物准备法术。GM会根据法术的环级和稀有度设置检定的DC。它通常比@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Q5iIYCFdqJFM31GW]{学习法术 Learning the Spell}更简单一些。

成功 你使用借来的法术正常进行了法术准备。

失败 你没能准备好该法术，但该法术位仍然可以供你准备其他法术。在下次准备法术之前，你无法再次借用这个法术。

Light Speed.name: Light Speed
Light Speed.description:
Frequency once per 10 minutes

Requirements You are not @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}

Effect You dash across the battlefield at the speed of light, far too fast for others to perceive. You teleport yourself (and any items you're wearing and holding) to an unoccupied space you can see within 240 feet.

Analyze Environment.name: Analyze Environment
Analyze Environment.description:
Requirements You have environmental protection on your armor or a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.pEob2HYKeFtToeeC]{field scientist's kit}

You analyze your environment to determine whether it's safe by checking the gauges and sensors on your armor or a field scientist's kit you're holding. You move at half your travel speed or slower. You automatically detect any environmental hazard that your armor protects against, including the severity of the environmental condition (such as the temperature, radiation level, the presence or lack of air, and so on).

Mount.name: 骑乘 Mount
Mount.description:
需求 你邻接一个体型至少大于你一级且自愿成为你坐骑的生物。

你骑乘上该生物。若你已处于骑乘中，使用该动作会改让你脱离骑乘，站到邻接坐骑的一个格子中。

Grapple.name: 擒拿 Grapple
Grapple.description:
需求 你至少有一只空闲手，目标的体型不超过你一级以上。

你试图用自己的空闲手抓住一个生物或物体。进行[[/act grapple]]检定对抗目标的强韧DC。你可以在没有空闲手的情况下擒拿已经@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的目标。

大成功 除非你移动或者你的目标逃脱，否则你的目标在你下一回合结束前都会陷入束缚。

成功 除非你移动或者你的目标逃脱，否则你的目标在你下一回合结束前都会陷入受擒。

失败 你没能抓住目标。如果你之前已经使用擒拿使该目标陷入受擒或束缚，那么目标的上述状态也随之结束。

大失败 如果你之前已经使用擒拿使该目标陷入受擒或束缚，那么目标会挣脱。你的目标可以反过来擒拿住你，视为该目标成功对你使用了擒拿动作，也可以强迫你坠落且在落地时@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

Learn a Spell.name: 学习法术 Learn a Spell
Learn a Spell.description:
Magical Traditions and Skills

Each magical tradition has a corresponding skill, as shown on the table below. You must have the trained proficiency rank in a skill to use it to Identify Magic or Learn a Spell. Something without a specific tradition, such as an item with the magical trait, can be identified using any of these skills.

Magical TraditionCorresponding Skill
ArcaneArcana
DivineReligion
OccultOccultism
PrimalNature

Requirements You have a spellcasting class feature, and the spell you want to learn is on your magical tradition's spell list.

You can gain access to a new spell of your tradition from someone who knows that spell or from magical writing like a spellbook or scroll. If you can cast spells of multiple traditions, you can Learn a Spell of any of those traditions, but you must use the corresponding skill to do so. For example, if you were an elemental mystic with the witchwarper multiclass archetype, you couldn't use Nature to add an arcane or occult spell to your witchwarper spell repertoire.

To learn the spell, you must do the following:

  • Spend 1 hour per spell rank, during which you must remain in conversation with a person who knows the spell or have the magical writing in your possession.
  • Have materials with the Price indicated in the Learning a Spell table.
  • Attempt a skill check for the skill corresponding to your tradition (DC determined by the GM, often close to the DC on the Learning a Spell Table). Uncommon or rare spells have higher DCs; full guidelines for the GM appear on page 52 of Starfinder GM Core.

Learning a Spell

Spell RankPriceTypical DC
1st or cantrip20 credits15
2nd60 credits18
3rd160 credits20
4th360 credits23
5th700 credits26
6th1,400 credits28
7th3,000 credits31
8th6,500 credits34
9th15,000 credits36
10th70,000 credits41

Critical Success You expend half the materials and learn the spell.

Success You expend the materials and learn the spell.

Failure You fail to learn the spell but can try again after you gain a level. The materials aren't expended.

Critical Failure As failure, except you expend half the materials.

Feint.name: 虚招 Feint
Feint.description:
需求 你尝试对其使用虚招的目标必须处于你的近战触及范围内。

用一个带有误导性的华丽动作让对手对你真正的攻击毫无防备。进行[[/act feint]]检定对抗目标的察觉DC。

大成功 你让敌人对你完全乱了阵脚。直到你的下一个回合结束前，目标对你的近战攻击都视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

成功 你的敌人被戏耍了，但只是暂时的。在当前回合结束前，目标对你的下一次近战攻击视为措手不及。

大失败 你的虚招适得其反。你的下一个回合结束前，你对目标的近战攻击都视为措手不及。

Once More with Feeling.name: Once More with Feeling
Once More with Feeling.description:
Frequency once per day

Trigger An ally within 30 feet fails at a skill check

Effect You direct the ally on how to perform the task, allowing that ally to reroll the triggering skill check and use the better result.

Maneuver in Flight.name: 空中机动 Maneuver in Flight
Maneuver in Flight.description:
需求 你拥有飞行速度

你在飞行过程中尝试困难机动。进行[[/act maneuver-in-flight]]检定。GM会决定你可以做哪些机动，但他们通常不会允许你以超过飞行速度的距离移动。

成功 你成功进行了机动。

失败 你的机动失败了。GM会决定你只是无法移动还是发生了其他不利影响。其结果应当与你尝试的机动相符（例如你尝试逆风飞行，就会被风吹离航线）。

大失败 类似失败，但后果更糟。

空中机动任务范例

  • 受训 大角度爬升或俯冲
  • 专家 逆风飞行
  • 大师 掉转航向
  • 传奇 穿越强风飞行

Earn Income.name: 赚取收入 Earn Income
Earn Income.description:
You can use a skill to earn money during downtime. You must be trained in the skill to do so. This takes time to set up, and your income depends on your proficiency rank and how lucrative a task you can find. Because this process requires a significant amount of time and involves tracking things outside the progress of adventures, it won't come up in every campaign. The most typical ways to Earn Income, detailed further in this section are:

  • Crafting goods for the market (Crafting)
  • Practicing a Trade (Lore)
  • Staging a Performance (Performance)

In some cases, the GM might let you use a different skill to Earn Income through specialized work. This might be scholarly work, such as using Religion to study an alien culture's faith—but live streaming a sermon would still fall under Performance instead of Religion. You also might be able to use physical skills to make money, such as using Athletics to haul cargo at a spaceport or Thievery to pick pockets at a crowded concert. If you're using a skill other than Crafting, Lore, or Performance, the DC tends to be significantly higher.

Earn Income

Downtime

You use one of your skills to make money during downtime. The GM assigns a task level representing the most lucrative job available. You can search for lower-level tasks, with the GM determining whether you find any. Sometimes you can attempt to find better work than the initial offerings, though this takes time and requires using the Diplomacy skill to Gather Information, doing some research, or socializing.

When you take on a job, the GM secretly sets the DC of your skill check. After your first day of work, you roll to determine your earnings. You gain an amount of income based on your result, the task's level, and your proficiency rank (as listed on the Income Earned table).

You can continue working at the task on subsequent days without needing to roll again. For each day you spend after the first, you earn the same amount as the first day, up until the task's completion. The GM determines how long you can work at the task. Most tasks last a week or two, though some can take months or even years.

Table 4-2: Income Earned

Task LevelFailureTrainedExpertMasterLegendary
01 credit1 credit1 credit1 credit1 credit
11 credit2 credits2 credits2 credits2 credits
21 credit3 credits3 credits3 credits3 credits
31 credit5 credits5 credits5 credits5 credits
41 credit7 credits8 credits8 credits8 credits
52 credits9 credits10 credits10 credits10 credits
63 credits15 credits20 credits20 credits20 credits
74 credits20 credits25 credits25 credits25 credits
85 credits25 credits30 credits30 credits30 credits
96 credits30 credits40 credits40 credits40 credits
107 credits40 credits50 credits60 credits60 credits
118 credits50 credits60 credits80 credits80 credits
129 credits60 credits80 credits100 credits100 credits
1310 credits70 credits100 credits150 credits150 credits
1415 credits80 credits150 credits200 credits200 credits
1520 credits100 credits200 credits280 credits280 credits
1625 credits130 credits250 credits360 credits400 credits
1730 credits150 credits300 credits450 credits550 credits
1840 credits200 credits450 credits700 credits900 credits
1960 credits300 credits600 credits1,000 credits1,300 credits
2080 credits400 credits750 credits1,500 credits2,000 credits
20 (critical success)-500 credits900 credits1,750 credits3,000 credits

Critical Success You do outstanding work. Gain the amount of currency listed for the task level + 1 and your proficiency rank.

Success You do competent work. Gain the amount of currency listed for the task level and your proficiency rank.

Failure You do shoddy work and get paid the bare minimum for your time. Gain the amount of currency listed in the failure column for the task level. The GM will likely reduce how long you can continue at the task.

Critical Failure You earn nothing for your work and are fired immediately. You can't continue at the task. Your reputation suffers, potentially making it difficult for you to find rewarding jobs in that community in the future.

Sample Earn Income Tasks

These examples use Piloting to work as a pilot or Legal Lore to perform legal work.

  • Trained run speedy errands on your enercycle, do legal research
  • Expert pilot a small salvage ship, present minor court cases
  • Master pilot a large research vessel or freighter, present important court cases
  • Legendary run an interplanetary pilot training program, argue a case against an Embri Speaker and their coterie in their own court

Crafting Goods for the Market [Crafting]

Using Crafting, you can work at producing common items for the market. It's usually easy to find work making basic items whose level is 1 or 2 below your settlement's level.

Higher-level tasks represent special commissions, which might require you to Craft a specific item using the Craft downtime activity and sell it to a buyer at full Price. These opportunities don't occur as often and might have special requirements—or serious consequences if you disappoint a prominent client.

Practicing a Trade [Lore]

You apply the practical benefits of one of your Lore specialties during downtime by practicing your trade. This is most effective for Lore specialties like business, law, or mining, where there's high demand for workers. The GM might increase the DC or determine only low-level tasks are available if you're attempting to use an obscure Lore skill to Earn Income. You might also need specialized tools to accept a job, like an enercycle to conduct deliveries in a busy city or a fashionable suit to attend a meeting with corporate clients.

Staging a Performance [Performance]

You perform for an audience to make money. The available audiences determine the level of your task, since more discerning audiences are harder to impress but provide a bigger payout. The GM determines the task level based on the audiences available. Performing for a typical audience in a seedy bar is a level 0 task, but a performance for a group of fellow musicians with more refined tastes might be a 2nd- or 3rd-level task, and ones for wealthy clients, fashionistas, and interstellar dignitaries are increasingly higher level.

Your degree of success determines whether you moved your audience and whether you were rewarded with rave reviews or downvotes.

Ending or Interrupting Tasks

When a task you're doing is complete, or if you stop in the middle of one, you normally have to find a new task if you want to keep Earning Income. For instance, if you quit your job working at the space docks, you'll need to find another place of employment instead of picking up where you left off. This usually takes 1 day or more of downtime looking for leads on new jobs.

However, you might pause a task due to an adventure or event that wouldn't prevent you from returning to the old job later. The GM might decide that you can pick up where you left off, assuming the task hasn't been completed by others in your absence. Whether you roll a new skill check when you resume is also up to the GM. Generally speaking, if you had a good initial roll and want to keep it, you can, but if you had a bad initial roll, you can't try for a better one by pausing to do something else. If your statistics changed during the break—usually because you leveled up while adventuring—you can attempt a new check.

Steal.name: 盗窃 Steal
Steal.description:
你尝试在不受注意的情况下从另一个生物身上偷走一个小物件。通常你只能对负重忽略不计的物品使用盗窃，且你必须有空闲的手，如果携带该物品生物处于战斗或戒备状态，你会自动失败。

进行[[/act steal]]检定来判定你能否成功偷走物品。检定的DC通常等于携带物体生物的察觉DC。盗窃一件穿戴在身上但未加严密看管的物品最容易（比如一个装满钱币的松垮口袋，或者口袋里的东西）。如果物品受到保护，或者物品的性质使其难以偷盗（比如大背包中的一件小物品，或者夹在其他文件中的一张羊皮纸），GM可能会提升DC。比如物品装在口袋里，拿在一个生物手中或者受到保护，那么DC通常会高出5点。

你可能还需要将你的贼活检定结果与穿戴该物品的人之外的观察者的察觉DC进行比较。GM可能会给漫不经心的观察者的察觉DC附加环境减值。

成功 你在持有者没注意的情况下偷走了该物品，或者观察者没有看到你偷走或试图偷走物品。

失败 物品的持有者会在你偷走之前注意到你的动作，或者观察者看到你偷走或试图偷走物品。由GM决定注意到你盗窃行为的生物的反应。

Hack.name: Hack
Hack.description:
Requirements You have a hacking toolkit.

You try to access, control, or change an active secured system. In most cases, this attempt is made against a local computer system that you access directly or indirectly through use of a hacking toolkit. Attempt a Computers check to determine if you can access the targeted system. Computers with improved systems might require multiple successes to access.

Critical Success You access the system, or you achieve two successes toward accessing a system requiring more than one success. You leave no trace of your tampering.

Success You access the system, or you achieve one success toward accessing a system that requires more than one success.

Failure You fail to access the system or achieve any success toward accessing a system that requires more than one success. Some computerized systems might have security measures that activate on a failure.

Critical Failure You activate specially ingrained security protocols or completely lock yourself out of the system. Being locked out of a system prevents you from attempting another check to access it for the next hour.

Ready Arms!.name: Ready Arms!
Ready Arms!.description:
With quick commands, you get your allies to ready their equipment. You and all allies within 30 feet can Interact to draw, Switch Hands, or swap weapons as a free action.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, you can Strike, Area Fire, or Auto-Fire with a weapon you drew or swapped to (including by changing active set of hands). If your Strike hits or if a target failed its save against your Area Fire or Auto-Fire, one ally can make a Strike against the same target as a reaction.

Cover Tracks.name: 掩盖行踪 Cover Tracks
Cover Tracks.description:
你可以以一半的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.DUOb8QrlC5t0adkL]{Travel Speed}移动来掩盖自己的行踪。掩盖行踪时你不需要进行生存检定，但如果你的生存DC高于追踪你所需要的标准DC，那么任何试图@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track}你的生物都需要进行生存检定对抗你的生存DC。

一些情况下，你可能需要在遭遇中掩盖行踪。此时你的掩盖行踪是一个单动作，不具有探索特征。

Deny Failure.name: Deny Failure
Deny Failure.description:
Frequency once per day

Trigger You fail or critically fail a saving throw

Effect You refuse to accept your failure! Reroll the triggering saving throw. If your result is a critical failure, this use of Deny Failure doesn't count toward its frequency.

Force Open.name: 破拆 Force Open
Force Open.description:
用你的身体、杠杆或其他工具强行打开门、窗、容器或坚固的大门。只要检定结果足够高，你甚至可以撞开墙壁。在没有撬棍的情况下使用破拆撬开东西的[[/act force-open]]检定会受到-2物品减值。

大成功 你打开了门、窗或容器或大门，并且避免了在开启的过程中损坏它。

成功 你打开了门、窗或容器或大门，它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{Broken}状态。如果它非常坚固，GM可能会让它受到伤害但不会破损。

大失败 你的尝试使得门、窗、容器或大门时卡死了，接下来的破拆会承受-2的环境减值。

破拆任务范例

  • 未受训 织物，易碎的玻璃
  • 受训 冰块，结实的玻璃
  • 专家 脆弱的木门，木质吊闸
  • 大师 坚固的木门，铁质吊闸，金属栏杆
  • 传奇 石门或铁门

Escape.name: 逃脱 Escape
Escape.description:
你尝试从@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}状态中逃脱出来。选择一个生物、物体、法术效果、危害或其他对你施加上述状态的事物。进行一次逃脱检定，使用你的[[/act escape statistic=unarmed]]{无武装攻击调整值}对抗效果DC。该DC通常是擒抱你的生物的运动DC，捆绑你的生物的贼活DC，法术效果的法术DC，物体、危害或事物列出的逃脱DC等等。你可以选择进行[[/act escape statistic=acrobatics]]或[[/act escape statistic=athletics]]检定代替无武装攻击调整值（该动作依然保有攻击特征）。

大成功 你获得自由，移除目标对你施加的擒抱、禁足或束缚状态。你还能立刻行走至多5尺。

成功 你获得自由，移除目标对你施法的擒抱、禁足或束缚状态。

大失败 你没有获得自由，且直到你的下一轮你无法再进行逃脱尝试。

Oppressive Presence.name: Oppressive Presence
Oppressive Presence.description:
Frequency once per round

You unnerve foes with a look, or similarly unsettle them with subtle mannerisms or veiled threats. One enemy creature of your choice within 60 feet becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn. If the creature targets you with a Strike or other offensive action, it loses the suppressed condition from this effect.

Treat Disease.name: 治疗疾病 Treat Disease
Treat Disease.description:
Requirements You're wearing or holding a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.s1vB3HdXjMigYAnY]{medkit}

You spend at least 8 hours caring for a diseased creature. Attempt a [[/act treat-disease]]{Medicine} check against the disease's DC. After you attempt to Treat a Disease for a creature, you can't try again until after that creature's next save against the disease.

Critical Success You grant the creature a +4 circumstance bonus to its next saving throw against the disease.

Success You grant the creature a +2 circumstance bonus to its next saving throw against the disease.

Critical Failure Your efforts cause the creature to take a −2 circumstance penalty to its next save against the disease.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.TGGdM7XnjQkkijK7]{Effect: Treat Disease}

Search.name: 搜寻 Search
Search.description: 你细致地 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索 Seek} 着密门（hidden doors）、隐藏的危害（concealed hazards）等事物。通常来说你可以作出有根据的推测（educated guess）来判断最好应该检查哪个位置并以半速进行搜寻，但如果你想进行彻底搜寻并确保自己检查过所有东西，则需要以不超过300尺/分钟的速度旅行，但是只有在你的速度不超过150尺/分钟时，才能够在自己移动进入对象范围内之前检查所有东西。你在进行搜寻时总是能够以更慢的速度移动来更彻底地探寻你经过的区域，而 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.GdZLxDtFXaQI3Fop]{迅速搜寻 Expeditious Search} 专长可以提高这么做的最高速度。若你在搜寻时遇到了密门、物品或危害，GM会尝试一次无消耗的秘密检定（free Secret Checks），来判断你是否注意到隐藏的物体或危害。若某个地点内具有许多对象可以进行搜寻，那你就必须停下来并花费更多的时间来进行彻底的搜寻。

Crawl.name: 爬行 Crawl
Crawl.description:
需求 你处于倒地状态且速度至少为10尺。

你爬行移动5尺，保持@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}状态。

Step.name: 快步 Step
Step.description:
需求 你的速度至少为10尺。

你小心移动5尺。和大多数移动类型不同，快步不会触发那些因移动动作或进出格子而触发的反应动作，例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KAVf7AmRnbCAHrkT]{反应打击 Reactive Strike}。

你无法快步进入困难地形，也无法使用陆地速度之外的速度进行快步。

Avert Gaze.name: 转移目光 Avert Gaze
Avert Gaze.description: You avert your gaze from danger. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saves against visual abilities that require you to look at a creature or object, such as the radiant gaze of a solar nymph. Your gaze remains averted until the start of your next turn.

Transfer Vitality.name: Transfer Vitality
Transfer Vitality.description: You can transfer up to 10 Hit Points (minimum 1) from your vitality network into yourself or a bonded creature you can sense within 60 feet. This works on creatures with void healing as though this action had the void trait. The amount you can transfer increases by 10 at 5th, 10th, 15th and 20th level.

Targeted Immunization.name: Targeted Immunization
Targeted Immunization.description:
Trigger You recover from a disease or poison

Effect You instinctively synthesize antigens that make you immune to the triggering disease or poison. This immunity lasts for the next day or until you next use Targeted Immunization.

Sneak.name: 潜行 Sneak
Sneak.description:
你尝试移动到另一个地方的同时进入或保持无踪状态。你以半速行走。（如果拥有相应的移动类型，你可以在潜行时使用掘地、攀爬、飞行或游泳代替行走，但必须以对应速度的半速移动。）

当你移动结束后，GM会为你暗骰[[/act sneak]]检定，将结果与你在移动开始前对其视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{无踪 Undetected}状态的各个生物的察觉DC进行比较。如果你在行走时对该生物拥有掩蔽或高等掩蔽，掩蔽将会赋予你的隐秘检定+2环境加值（高等掩蔽则为+4）。由于你正在移动，所以无法从寻找掩蔽 Taking Cover中获得加值。如果你移动结束时既没有对一个生物视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}状态，也没有对其掩蔽或高等掩蔽，你就无法对其掷骰，你会自动被这样的生物视为可见。

成功 你在移动过程中和移动结束后都对该生物保持无踪状态。

只要你进行了除躲藏、潜行或快步之外的任何事情，你就会立刻变为可见。如果你试图打击一个生物，该生物对本次攻击@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，然后你变为可见状态。GM可能会允许你在不被人注意的情况下进行一个特别不引人注目的动作，但这可能需要再次进行隐秘检定。如果你说话或故意发出噪音，就会变为从无踪变为藏匿状态。

如果一个生物使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索 Seek}使你变为藏匿状态，你就需要再次成功潜行才能恢复无踪状态。

失败 你发出的声响或其他蛛丝马迹会暴露你的位置，但你仍然未被发现。你在移动过程中和移动结束后都对该生物藏匿。

大失败 你被发现了！你在移动过程中和移动结束后都对该生物可见。如果你处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}状态且之前对该生物藏匿，那么你在移动过程中和移动结束后都对该生物藏匿，而不是可见。

Foresight.name: 预警 Foresight
Foresight.description:
触发 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{预警术 Foresight} 的目标对一个敌对生物或者其他危险展开防御。

效果 如果敌对生物或者危险令目标掷骰（例如一次豁免骰），目标可以骰两次并使用更高的结果，并且该法术获得幸运特征。但如果敌对生物或者危险掷骰对抗目标（例如攻击骰或者技能检定），该敌对生物或者危险骰两次并使用较低的结果，并且该法术获得厄运特征。

Cosmic Blast.name: Cosmic Blast
Cosmic Blast.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect You fire a powerful laser blast in a @Template[type:line|distance:120], dealing @Damage[7d12[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save using your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher).

Strike.name: 打击 Strike
Strike.description:
你使用自己持用的一件武器或无武装进行一次攻击，目标是你触及内（若为近战攻击）或射程内（若为远程攻击）的一个生物。根据使用的武器或无武装攻击的攻击调整值掷攻击骰，将结果和目标生物的AC进行比较以确定结果。

大成功 根据武器或无武装攻击掷伤害骰，并且造成双倍伤害。

成功 根据武器或无武装攻击掷伤害骰，并且造成伤害。

Improvised Mastery.name: Improvised Mastery
Improvised Mastery.description:
Frequency once per day

Trigger You're about to attempt a skill check using a skill that you don't have master proficiency in, and you haven't rolled yet.

You trust your instincts to see you through. You gain master proficiency with the triggering skill for the skill check.

Hide.name: 躲藏 Hide
Hide.description:
你躲在掩蔽、高等掩蔽或者可以使你隐蔽的地方，从@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed}变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}状态。GM会为你暗骰[[/act hide]]检定，将结果与每个你对其拥有掩蔽、高等掩蔽或隐蔽状态，但视你为可见的生物的察觉DC进行比较。如果你拥有标准掩蔽，你的检定将获得+2环境加值（高等掩蔽则为+4）。

成功 如果该生物能看见你，那么你现在从对其可见变为对其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}。如果你已经处于藏匿状态或对该生物@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}，你保持这种状态。

如果你成功对一个生物视为藏匿，但随后不再对它拥有掩蔽、高等掩蔽或隐蔽状态，它就会再次视你为可见。如果你进行了除躲藏、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{Step}之外的任何事情，你就不再处于藏匿状态。如果你试图打击一个生物，该生物对本次攻击措手不及，然后你变为可见状态。如果你做了其他事情，除非GM另有决定，否则你在行动前就会变为可见状态。GM可能会允许你在不被人注意的情况下进行一个特别不引人注目的动作，但这可能需要再次进行隐秘检定。

如果一个生物使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}使你变为可见状态，你就需要再次成功躲藏才能恢复藏匿状态。

Network Spell.name: Network Spell
Network Spell.description: You channel your spell to manifest from one of your allies instead of yourself. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell with an area, range, or target, the spell manifests from one of your bonded allies instead of yourself. Use the ally's space to determine the spell's source, range, and area of effect, but line of sight and line of effect must be met from both you and your ally when the spell is cast. While this might fool someone who only sees your ally, unless you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or the spell has the subtle trait, any creature able to see both you and your ally can easily determine you're the source of the spell. If the spell has the subtle trait, you and your ally can Cast the Spell in a way that makes the ally appear to have cast it without that trait.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description: 你会定期施放@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{Detect Magic}。这要以旅行速度的一半或更慢的速度进行移动。在以最高300尺/分钟的速度旅行时，你不会意外忽略魔法灵光；但是只有在你的速度不超过150尺/分钟时，才能够在队伍移动到魔法灵光之内以前侦测到魔法灵光。

Access Infosphere.name: Access Infosphere
Access Infosphere.description:
Requirements You are using a device with infosphere access.

You attempt to access a local network, known as an infosphere, to come up with information on a topic. This typically takes 10 minutes of research to find information, with results like Recalling Knowledge on a topic. Larger investigations or topics could require several hours, while single-word answers of information common to that settlement's infosphere may only take a minute, based on the GM's discretion. Significant and longer investigations should use the research subsystem (GM Core). The GM determines the DC based on the topic you're researching. This can be further influenced by the quality of the local infosphere and what information it might possess on the topic, and how well organized it is.

Critical Success You find the information you were searching for. If this was used on a topic you could have used @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} on, you instead find this information in 1 minute.

Success You find the information you were looking for.

Critical Failure You find misleading information thanks to incorrect data or online pranksters. The GM provides you false information on your topic of investigation (or decides to give you no information, as on a failure).

Plate Deflection.name: Plate Deflection
Plate Deflection.description:
Frequency once per day

Trigger You're struck by a critical hit

Effect You deflect the attack to a heavily armored part of your body. You don't take double damage from the critical hit but still take other effects.

Piercing Spikes.name: Piercing Spikes
Piercing Spikes.description:
Trigger You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by a creature

Effect You twist and thrash your body around, dealing 1d4 plus your Strength modifier piercing damage (@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/4) + @actor.abilities.str.mod)d4[piercing]]) to the triggering creature. This damage increases by 1d4 at 5th level and every four levels thereafter.

Warp Reality.name: Warp Reality
Warp Reality.description:
Requirements Your quantum field isn't active.

Your quantum field activates and lasts as long as you Sustain it (up to 10 minutes) or until the end of your next turn. Your quantum field is a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] centered on a point you choose within 100 feet. While your quantum field is active, you can use actions that have the anchoring trait. Your quantum field's other specific effects are determined by your paradox. Choose whether any given creature in the area is affected by your quantum field when you Warp Reality, each time you Sustain it, and when a creature enters your quantum field. Each time you Sustain a quantum field with the Sustain action (instead of an anchoring action), you can move it to a new position within 100 feet.

Your quantum field automatically deactivates if you're knocked out, if you Dismiss it, or if you move more than 100 feet away from it.

Cast a Spell.name: 施放法术 Cast a Spell
Cast a Spell.description:
法术消耗的动作会变化，如法术的数据栏所展示。你以相同的过程施放戏法、从法术位施放法术、以及聚能法术，但从法术位施放法术时必须消耗该法术，施放聚能法术时必须消耗1聚能点。部分规则会引用施放法术行动，例如“如果你使用的下个动作是施放法术。”任何法术都满足施放法术行动，并且此法术的任何数据使用你要施放的那个法术。

开销和器材 部分法术需要你支付一定开销或者提供一个器材。如果法术列出了开销，你必须有列出的金钱、昂贵材料、或者其他资源以施放法术（例如宝石或者魔法制剂），这些会在施法过程中使用掉。

器材是一件汇聚或引导法术魔法能量的物体，在施法中不会被使用掉。作为施放法术的一部分，你取出器材（如果需要），并且如果你想要的话，可以将其收回。器材通常是昂贵的，你需要在施放法术前获取它们，但这不会像开销一样在施法中损耗。除非另外说明，器材负载为可忽略。

长施法时间 时间 部分法术需要花费数分钟或者数小时来施放。在施放这样的法术时，你不能使用其他的动作或者反应动作，根据GM的判断，你可能可以说几句话。类似其他花费长时间的行动，这些法术具有探索特征，并且不能在遭遇中施放这些法术。如果你在施法的过程中发生了战斗，你的法术被打断（见下文打断和失去法术）。

打断和失去法术 部分能力能打断法术，让其不产生效果并失去。当你失去一个法术时，你已经花费了法术位，花费了法术花费和动作，并且已使用了施放法术动作。如果法术在@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3f5DMFu8fPiqHpRg]{Sustain}动作中被打断，法术立即结束。

Board.name: 搭乘 Board
Board.description:
需求 你与载具搭乘点相邻

你通过敞篷、门、通道或舱口登上车辆；如果你已经在车上，你可以改为使用此动作下车到靠近车辆入口的空地。在车辆行驶时使用此动作具有挑战性，需要成功的特技或运动检定，DC等于车辆的AC。

Repair.name: 修理 Repair
Repair.description:
Requirements You are holding or wearing a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.vLGDUFrg4yGzpTQX]{repair toolkit}.

You spend 10 minutes attempting to fix a damaged item, placing the item on a stable surface and using the repair kit with both hands. The GM sets the DC, but it's usually about the same DC to Repair a given item as it is to Craft it in the first place. You can't Repair a destroyed item.

Critical Success You restore 10 Hit Points to the item, plus an additional 10 Hit Points per proficiency rank you have in Crafting (a total of 20 HP if you're trained, 30 HP if you're an expert, 40 HP if you're a master, or 50 HP if you're legendary).

Success You restore 5 Hit Points to the item, plus an additional 5 per proficiency rank you have in Crafting (for a total of 10 HP if you are trained, 15 HP if you're an expert, 20 HP if you're a master, or 25 HP if you're legendary).

Critical Failure You deal [[/r {2d6}]]{2d6 damage} to the item. Apply the item's Hardness to this damage.

Swim.name: 游泳 Swim
Swim.description:
你尝试进行[[/act swim]]检定在水中移动最远10尺距离。GM会根据水的湍急程度或危险性来确定DC。大多数风平浪静的情况下你会自动获得大成功。如果你的陆地移动速度至少为40尺，那么你的速度每比20尺多20尺，你的最大移动距离就能再增加5尺。

如果你在水中结束回合，但在该回合中的游泳动作没能成功，则由GM决定你会下沉10尺还是被水冲走。如果你在回合结束前的最后一个动作才进入水中，则这条规则不适用。

大成功 你在水中移动，最大移动距离增加5尺。

成功 你在水中移动。

大失败 你没能移动。如果你屏息，你会失去1轮的空气。

范例游泳情景

未受训 湖泊或其他平静水域

受训 流淌的水域，比如河流

专家 湍急河流

大师 惊涛骇浪

传奇 旋涡、瀑布

Fly.name: 飞行 Fly
Fly.description:
需求 你拥有飞行速度。

你在空中飞行至多等于飞行速度的距离。向上飞行（垂直向上或斜向上）使用在困难地形移动的规则。每消耗5尺移动可以垂直下降10尺距离。若你飞行到地面上，不会受到坠落伤害。你可以使用一个该动作飞行0尺以保持悬停在空中。若你在回合结束时处于空中而次回合没有使用过该飞行动作，你会坠落。

Disable a Device.name: 解除装置 Disable a Device
Disable a Device.description:
This action allows you to disarm a trap or another complex device. Often, a device requires numerous successes before becoming disabled, depending on its construction and complexity. An @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.coJUVZGcuVg3FoYh]{infiltrator's toolkit} is helpful and sometimes even required to Disable a Device, as determined by the GM, and sometimes a device requires a higher proficiency rank in Thievery to disable it.

Your [[/act disable-device]]{Thievery} check result determines your progress.

Critical Success You disable the device, or you achieve two successes toward disabling a device requiring more than one success. You leave no trace of your tampering, and you can rearm the device later, if that type of device can be rearmed.

Success You disable the device, or you achieve one success toward disabling a device that requires more than one success.

Critical Failure You trigger the device.

Defend.name: 防卫 Defend
Defend.description: 你竖起盾牌并以旅行速度的一半进行移动。若发生战斗，你会在你的第一个回合开始之前获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{举起盾牌}的好处。

Get 'Em!.name: Get 'Em!
Get 'Em!.description:
You single out an enemy for you and your allies to focus your attacks on. Select an enemy within 60 feet that you can see. You and your allies gain a +1 status bonus to attacks against that target until the beginning of your next turn.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, Strike the target. You gain a status bonus to the damage roll equal to your Charisma modifier. Regardless of whether the Strike hits, you and your allies gain a +1 status bonus to damage on subsequent Strikes made against the enemy until the start of your next turn. Increase the damage by 1 at 5th, 10th, 15th, and 20th levels.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ey2zSEnprAGgvrij]{Effect: Get 'Em!}

Install Upgrade.name: Install Upgrade
Install Upgrade.description:
Requirements You must use a repair toolkit.

You spend 10 minutes installing an upgrade into a suit of armor or weapon, placing it into an empty upgrade slot. You can also use this activity to uninstall an upgrade. You can't install more upgrades than there are upgrade slots. Installing or uninstalling an upgrade requires using a repair toolkit with two hands.

Leap.name: 跳跃 Leap
Leap.description:
你进行一次稳定的短程跳跃，可以是水平跳或垂直跳。较远的跳跃需要使用运动技能进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}。

  • 水平 若你的速度至少有15尺你可以水平跳跃10尺，若你的速度至少有30尺你可以水平跳跃15尺。你会落地在跳跃结束的格子中（意味着你可以跳过5尺的裂缝，若速度为30尺或更多时可以跳过10尺的裂缝）。若你的速度低于15尺，你无法进行水平跳跃。
  • 垂直 你可以垂直跳起至多3尺，同时水平跳跃5尺到较高的平面上。

Decipher Writing.name: 解译文书 Decipher Writing
Decipher Writing.description:
You attempt to decipher complicated writing or literature on an obscure topic. This usually takes 1 minute per page of text, but might take longer (typically an hour per page for decrypting ciphers or the like). The text must be in a language you can read, though the GM might allow you to attempt to decipher text written in an unfamiliar language using [[/act decipher-writing statistic=society]]{Society} instead.

The DC is determined by the GM based on the state or complexity of the document. The GM might have you roll one check for a short text or a check for each section of a larger text.

Skill

Typically used for

[[/act decipher-writing statistic=arcana]]{Arcana}

Writing about magic or science

[[/act decipher-writing statistic=computers]]{Computers}

Programming or other computer languages

[[/act decipher-writing statistic=occultism]]{Occultism}

Esoteric texts about mysteries and philosophy

[[/act decipher-writing statistic=religion]]{Religion}

Scripture

[[/act decipher-writing statistic=society]]{Society}

Coded messages, archaic text, or (in some cases) alien languages

Critical Success You understand the true meaning of the text.

Success You understand the true meaning of the text. If it was a coded document, you know the general meaning but might not have a word-for-word translation.

Failure You can't understand the text and take a –2 circumstance penalty to further checks to decipher it.

Critical Failure You believe you understand the text on that page, but you have in fact misconstrued its message.

Sample Decipher Tasks

Trained entry-level philosophy treatise

Expert complex code, such as a cipher

Master spymaster's code or advanced research notes

Legendary esoteric text written in metaphor by an extraplanar being

Ready.name: 准备 Ready
Ready.description:
你准备在自己回合外进行一个动作。选择一个你能使用的单动作或自由动作，并设置一个触发条件。你的回合立刻结束。若你设置的触发条件在你的下一回合开始前发生，你可用一个反应动作使用选定的动作（被选定的动作此时已然必须满足所有需求）。你无法准备一个已有触发条件的自由动作。

若你已有多重攻击减值且被准备的动作是一个攻击动作，你所准备的攻击会受到你使用准备时的多重攻击减值的影响。这是少数几个多重攻击减值会影响到你回合外的状况之一。

Reactive Step.name: Reactive Step
Reactive Step.description:
Trigger A creature within your reach leaves a square during a move action it's using.

You're able to move deftly around your foes, getting out of tricky situations or managing to put yourself into a place where you hold the advantage. You Step up to twice directly toward the triggering creature.

Identify Magic.name: 辨识魔法 Identify Magic
Identify Magic.description:
如果你发现一件物品，一个地点或是一个持续效果具有魔法性质，你就可以花费10分钟来尝试判断其中的魔法特质。如果你的尝试遭到打断就必须重新开始。GM会为你的检定设置DC。诅咒魔法或极为神秘的物品通常具有更高的DC，甚至可能无法单独依靠该行动进行辨识。升阶过的法术不会增加对其辨识的DC。

大成功 你了解了该魔法的全部属性，包括它的名称（如果是一种效果）、它的作用、启动它的所有方法（如果是物品或地点），以及它是否遭到诅咒。

成功 如果它是一件物品或一个地点，你能够了解它的作用，并掌握启动它的所有方法。如果它是持续效果（例如有持续时间的法术），你可以得知该效果的名称和作用。你不能重新进行尝试来获取大成功。

失败 你无法辨识这种魔法，并且在1天内无法重试。

大失败 你把该魔法误认成了GM选择的另外一种魔法。

Lie.name: 说谎 Lie
Lie.description:
你试图用谎言欺骗他人。说谎至少需要花费1轮时间，如果谎言需要精心策划，则要花费更长时间。你进行一个[[/act lie]]检定，将结果与你试图欺骗的每个生物的察觉DC进行比较。GM可能会根据情况和你所说谎言的性质给予他们一定的环境加值。精心策划或让人非常难以置信的谎言相比更简单可信的谎言更加难以让一个生物相信，有些谎言太过不着边际，任何人都不会相信。

根据GM的判断，如果一个生物最初相信了你的谎言，它可能会在稍后尝试用察觉检定@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive}来对抗你的欺骗DC，从而意识到这是一个谎言。通常如果该生物发现了足够能反驳你论述的证据，就会发生这种情况。

成功 目标相信你的谎言。

失败 目标不相信你的谎言，并且在与你谈话期间对抗说谎时获得+4环境加值。目标在未来也更有可能对你产生怀疑。

Sense Direction.name: 辨别方向 Sense Direction
Sense Direction.description:
Using the position of astronomical objects in the sky, traits of the geography or flora, or the behavior of fauna, you can stay oriented in the wild. Typically, you attempt a [[/act sense-direction]]{Survival} check only once per day, but some environments or changes might necessitate rolling more often. The GM determines the DC and how long this activity takes (usually just a minute or so). More unusual locales or those you're unfamiliar with might require you to have a minimum proficiency rank to Sense Direction. Without a comm unit, you take a –2 item penalty to checks to Sense Direction.

Critical Success You get an excellent sense of where you are. If you are in an environment with cardinal directions, you know them exactly.

Success You gain enough orientation to avoid becoming hopelessly lost. If you are in an environment with cardinal directions, you have a sense of those directions.

Sense Direction Tasks

  • Untrained determine a cardinal direction
  • Trained find an overgrown path in a forest
  • Expert navigate a simple maze
  • Master navigate a relatively featureless moon
  • Legendary navigate an ever-changing occult realm

Eccentric Orbit.name: Eccentric Orbit
Eccentric Orbit.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect Your telekinetic hands swiftly maneuver, allowing you either to Switch Hands or to increase the reach of your telekinetic hands by 5 feet until the beginning of your next turn.

Create Forgery.name: 伪造文书 Create Forgery
Create Forgery.description:
需求 你具备合适的书写材料来伪造文书。

你制造出一份伪造的文件，这么做通常需要花费一天或一周的时间。由GM暗骰一次DC20的[[/act create-forgery]]检定。如果你需要伪造某个人的笔迹，你就需要获得该人的笔迹样本。否则你只要看过一份类似的文件，就可以在检定时获得最多+4的环境加值（由GM决定具体加值）。

成功 伪造出的文书质量相当可靠，不会被粗略检查的人发现它是伪造的（但还需参阅检验真伪）。

失败 伪造出的文件有一些明显的伪造痕迹，可能粗略检查就会被发现。每次有人粗略检查该文件，GM都会将你的检定结果与查看者的察觉DC或社群DC进行比较（二者取高）。如果你的检定结果没有超过粗略查看者的DC，则此人会得知该文件是伪造的。

验明真伪 Examining Forgeries

面对一份伪造的赝品，即便是蠢到一个眼神就能被愚弄的家伙也会花时间仔细检查文件的真伪。他们会使用不同技术和分析方法来检查这份文件背后的蛛丝马迹，进行暗骰的察觉或社群检定对抗伪造者的社群DC。如果成功，检查文件的人就会得知这份文件是伪造的。如果失败，他们会认为这份文件属实，除非有新的理由对该文件产生怀疑，否则就无法重试。如果PC检查了一份真实的文件，GM依然可以假装进行暗骰检定，然后再让PC发现该文件属实。

Telekinetic Lift.name: Telekinetic Lift
Telekinetic Lift.description:
Frequency once per round

Requirements You have at least one telekinetic hand free

Effect Your telekinetic hand lifts an object of up to 8 Bulk as though it were weightless. If the object is locked or otherwise held in place, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force it Open} using Arcana, Athletics, Occultism, or Physical Science Lore as part of this action. The object still has its full weight and Bulk for all other purposes—you just ignore that weight. This effect lasts until the end of your turn.

Steel Yourselves!.name: Steel Yourselves!
Steel Yourselves!.description:
Frequency once per hour

You encourage your allies to brace for impact or otherwise prepare for incoming damage. Allies within 60 feet who can sense you can spend 1 action on their turn to Brace For Impact. This action has the concentrate trait. Creatures that Brace for Impact gain temporary Hit Points equal to your Charisma modifier + your half your level for 1 minute.

Lead by Example If you spends two actions, you Brace For Impact. You and any ally who Braces for Impact before the start of your next turn also gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against effects that deal damage for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.RhmWzzEbiykniDHQ]{Effect: Steel Yourselves!}

Trip.name: 摔绊 Trip
Trip.description:
需求 你至少有一只空闲手，目标的体型不超过你一级以上。

你试图将一个生物摔倒在地。进行[[/act trip]]检定对抗目标的反射DC。

大成功 目标坠落且在落地时@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，受到@Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]]伤害。

成功 目标坠落且在落地时倒地。

大失败 你失去平衡，坠落且在落地时倒地。

Navigate.name: Navigate
Navigate.description:
You plan a short journey. While this is most often used when traveling with a mech, vehicle, or starship, the same skill can be used to determine the optimal route to take while traveling on foot. This lets you plan a general heading on a planetoid or guide your starship on an in-system voyage. If you're navigating a short journey, you typically attempt a Piloting check only once per day, but some environments or changes might necessitate rolling more often. The GM determines the DC and how long this activity takes (usually just a minute or so). More unusual locales or those you're unfamiliar with might require you to have a minimum proficiency rank to Navigate.

Critical Success You get an excellent sense of where you are. If you are in an environment with cardinal directions, you know them exactly.

Success You gain enough orientation to avoid becoming hopelessly lost. If you are in an environment with cardinal directions, you have a sense of those directions.

Secure Disguises.name: 获取伪装 Secure Disguises
Secure Disguises.description:
你寻求购买或制作伪装。尝试一个普通、困难或非常困难的工艺、欺骗、表演或社群检定。

成功 你成功购买或制作了伪装，获得1点只能用于掩护身份的EP。

失败 你只获得了无法使用的伪装。

Adaptive Locomotion.name: Adaptive Locomotion
Adaptive Locomotion.description:
Frequency once per hour

Effect You transform your limbs into either flippers or hooked pseudopods, to better traverse the surrounding environment. If you select flippers, you gain a swim Speed of 20 feet. If you select hooked pseudopods, you gain a climb Speed of 20 feet. This transformation lasts for 10 minutes.

Palm an Object.name: 手上功夫 Palm an Object
Palm an Object.description:
你拾起一件无人看管的小物件，并且尽量不引起他人注意。进行[[/act palm-an-object]]检定对抗所有当前正观察你的生物的察觉DC。通常你只能对负重忽略不计的物品使用贼活，但GM会根据情况另行决定。

成功 该生物不会注意到你拾起了该物品。

失败 该生物注意到你拾起了该物品。

Unbound Mind.name: Unbound Mind
Unbound Mind.description:
Trigger You attempt a saving throw against a mental effect, but you haven't rolled yet

Effect You refuse to conform to the will of others, shaking off their attempts to control you with sheer determination. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to the triggering saving throw and other saves against mental effects until the start of your next turn.

Soul Shield.name: Soul Shield
Soul Shield.description:
Frequency once per day

Trigger You would take void damage

Effect You push your soul out of your body and use it as a shield to protect your living form from the ravages of the void. You gain void healing until the beginning of your next turn, meaning you're damaged by vitality damage and healed by void effects that heal undead.

Squeeze.name: 挤入 Squeeze
Squeeze.description:
你扭曲身形[[/act squeeze]]{挤入}一个小到几乎无法进入的空间。只有非常小的空间才适用该动作。许多狭窄空间都属于困难地形，此时你无需进行该检定就可以用更快速度通过。

大成功 你能以每分钟10尺的速度挤入该空间。

成功 你能以每分钟5尺的速度挤入该空间。

大失败 你被卡在了狭窄的空间内。被困时你可以花1分钟以相同的DC再次尝试特技检定。除了大失败之外的任何结果都能使你脱困。

挤入任务范例

  • 受训 挤入与你肩膀差不多宽的空间
  • 大师 挤入与你的头差不多宽的空间

Scout.name: 侦察 Scout
Scout.description:
你在队伍的前后以半速进行侦察和警戒危险。在下一次遭遇开始时，你队伍中的每个生物都会在先攻检定中获得+1环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.EMqGwUi3VMhCjTlF]{Effect: Scout}

Run Over.name: 碾压 Run Over
Run Over.description:
需求 你正在驾驶一辆载具

（鲁莽） 你试图用你的载具碾过生物，可能同时撞到一个更大的生物或物体。如果你保持对载具的控制，载具会在当前行进方向直线上以两倍的速度移动。你尝试在你的行进路径中碾过任何比车辆小两个体型或更多的生物，并且你可以尝试撞击你行进路径上的一个比载具小一个体型或更多的生物或物体。

每个你路径上的生物，包括被撞击生物都承受载具的碰撞伤害（基础反射豁免，使用载具的碰撞DC)。如果被撞击的目标是一辆载具，它的驾驶员可以进行一次驾驶检定取代反射豁免，不影响结果等级的判断。如果你撞击的目标受到伤害，你和你的载具均受到碰撞伤害（无豁免），且你的移动结束。

Shimmering Dazzle.name: Shimmering Dazzle
Shimmering Dazzle.description:
Frequency once per hour

Effect Your chitin flares and shimmers in a hypnotic display of shifting color and soothing motion. Pick a creature within 30 feet. That creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Living Shield.name: Living Shield
Living Shield.description:
Trigger An ally you're providing cover to or adjacent to is damaged by an enemy

Effect Reduce the triggering damage by an amount equal to your level plus your Constitution modifier. You take an amount of damage equal to the damage negated.

Reposition.name: 移位 Reposition
Reposition.description:
需求 你至少有一只空闲手，或者正在使目标受擒或陷入束缚，该目标的体型不超过你一级以上。

你强行让一个生物或物体移位。进行[[/act reposition]]检定对抗目标的强韧DC。

大成功 你成功将该生物移动10尺。移动过程中必须将其保持在你的触及范围内，你不能将其移动到障碍物内或使其穿过障碍物。

成功 你成功将该生物移动5尺。移动过程中必须将其保持在你的触及范围内，你不能将其移动到障碍物内或使其穿过障碍物。

大失败 目标可以将你移动5尺。视作它成功对你进行了移位。

Overwhelming Strike.name: Overwhelming Strike
