Overwhelming Strike.description:
Trigger Your Strike hits a creature you've designated as your mark and deals damage.

The target becomes your choice of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the end of your next turn. That creature becomes immune to Overwhelming Strike until the end of your next turn.

Nanite Form Strike.name: Nanite Form Strike
Nanite Form Strike.description: You deal @Damage[10d6[acid]] damage to all creatures sharing your space (@Check[type:reflex|basic:true|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save with a DC equal to your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher).

Redirect Current.name: Redirect Current
Redirect Current.description:
Frequency once per hour

Trigger You take electricity damage, and your electricity resistance doesn't reduce this damage to 0

Effect After being shocked, you seize the electricity coursing through your body and redirect it at another creature within 30 feet. That creature can't have already taken damage from the effect that damaged you. That creature takes electricity damage equal to the amount of Hit Points you lost from the triggering electricity damage (@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save using your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher).

Livestream.name: Livestream
Livestream.description:
Requirements You must have an item with a camera and one free hand, mount, or uniclamp.

You record footage from your perspective using a comm unit or another device with a camera. This can be broadcast to a live audience or stored on a local device. The GM determines whether this significantly impacts your travel speed depending on the nature of your recording; simple footage doesn't affect your travel, while playing to the camera or lining up the best perspectives might require you to move at half speed.

Rebellious Defiance.name: Rebellious Defiance
Rebellious Defiance.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect You decry one foe within 100 feet that you can see as a tyrant or villain and prepare yourself to defy them, even until death. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on your attack rolls against this foe, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against the attacks, spells, and effects of this foe. These benefits last for 1 minute.

Keep on Keeping On!.name: Keep on Keeping On!
Keep on Keeping On!.description:
You push your allies to continue fighting despite their injuries. Select an ally within 30 feet. Until the start of your next turn, that ally increases the next healing they receive by an amount equal to your Charisma modifier plus half your level.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.piyxWlJUtjJIKdW4]{Effect: Keep on Keeping On!}

Lead by Example If you used two actions, you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.wYerMk6F1RZb0Fwt]{Battle Medicine} the target, and the target only becomes immune to Battle Medicine for the next 10 minutes instead of 1 day.

Switch Hands.name: Switch Hands
Switch Hands.description: You designate a pair of limbs as your active hands. You can only have one pair of hands designated as your active hands at a time.

Area Fire.name: Area Fire
Area Fire.description: You attempt to hit each creature in a designated area, which has a range equal to the weapon's range increment (for cone or line) or a designated radius of the explosion (for burst). For burst, you can position the center point anywhere within your first range increment. Any creatures in the area must succeed at a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save against your class DC plus the tracking value of the weapon (you don't roll an attack roll). This damage is area damage. Creatures who critically fail this save are subject to effects that occur on a critical hit with this weapon, including the weapon's critical specialization effect. Area Fire has an expend equal to the value listed on the weapon.

Gather Information.name: 搜集信息 Gather Information
Gather Information.description:
你在当地市场、酒馆和集会场所四处打探，试图了解特定的人物或话题。GM决定[[/act gather-information]]检定的DC和所需时间（通常为2小时，但有时会更长），以及你能否通过花钱贿赂、请客喝酒或是赠送礼物来获得额外好处。

成功 你搜集到了有关该人物或话题的的信息。具体细节由GM决定。

大失败 你搜集到了有关该人物或话题的错误信息。

搜集信息任务范例

  • 未受训 街谈巷议的话题
  • 受训 常见流言
  • 专家 含糊其辞的流言，保守不力的秘密
  • 大师 被严格保密或极其隐秘的信息
  • 传奇 只有极少数人，或者只有地位非凡的人所知的信息

Climb.name: 攀爬 Climb
Climb.description:
需求 你双手空闲。

你进行[[/act climb]]检定，尝试在一道斜坡中向上、向下或横向移动最多5尺距离。除非你具有攀爬速度，否则会在攀爬时陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。GM会根据斜坡的种类和环境确定DC。面对一座微不足道的斜坡，你可能无需检定直接获得大成功。如果你的陆地移动速度至少为40尺，那么你的速度每比20尺多20尺，攀爬的最大距离就能再增加5尺。

大成功 你沿着斜坡移动，最大移动距离增加5尺。

成功 你沿着斜坡移动。

大失败 你从坡上坠落下去。如果你从平坦的地表开始攀爬，你会坠落且在落地时@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

范例攀爬情景

  • 未受训 梯子、陡坡、低矮多枝的树木
  • 受训 索具、绳索、常见树木
  • 专家 有狭小抓手和落脚点的墙壁
  • 大师 有抓手和落脚点的天花板、石壁
  • 传奇 光滑表面

Interact.name: 交互 Interact
Interact.description: 你用手操作物体或地形。你可以抓起无主的或收纳起来的物体、拔出武器、将手中持握的物品换成另一个物品、开门、进行类似的行动。在极少数情况下可能需要进行技能检定来决定交互是否能成功。。

Nimbus Surge.name: Nimbus Surge
Nimbus Surge.description:
Trigger A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

Your nimbus surges with energy, forcing an opening in your foe's defenses. Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Graviton-Attuned If the Strike is a critical success, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of its turn.

Photon-Attuned If the Strike is a critical success, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the start of its turn.

Command an Animal.name: 指挥动物 Command an Animal
Command an Animal.description:
你向一只动物发出指令。进行[[/act command-an-animal]]检定对抗该动物的意志DC。如果该动物对你的态度较好，你提出了该动物乐于采取的行动，或者你愿意用食物招待该动物，那么GM可能会调整DC。

如果该动物对你的态度是敌对或不友善，你的尝试会自动失败。如果该动物对你的态度为乐于帮助，你的成功等级会提升一级。诸如@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Rq5wkA8DtsmbzoGV]{Ride}的专长也可以让你更容易就能命令动物。

大多数动物都理解@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.HYNhdaPtF1QmQbR3]{Drop Prone}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OdIUybJ3ddfL7wzj]{Stand}，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Stride}和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]{Strike}基本动作。如果该动物理解一项行动，例如马的飞奔，你就可以命令该动物执行这一行动，但必须在命令动物上花费与该行动数量相同的动作点数。你也可以花费多个动作命令动物在下一回合执行该数量的基本动作。例如，你可以花费3个动作命令一只动物行走三次，或者行走两次然后打击一次。

成功 该动物会在它的下一回合按照你的指令行事。

失败 该动物犹豫不决或抗拒命令，什么都不会做。

大失败 该动物执行了错误的动作或误解了你的指令，由GM决定它会执行哪些动作。

Conceal an Object.name: 隐藏物件 Conceal an Object
Conceal an Object.description:
你你将一个小物件藏在身上（比如一把负重L的武器）。当你带着一个藏起来的物件悄悄从可能注意到它的人身边经过时，GM会为你暗骰[[/act conceal-an-object]]检定，将检定结果与粗略检查的人的察觉DC进行比较。一旦GM为隐藏物件掷骰，无论你试图瞒过多少个粗略检查的人都会得到同样的结果。如果一个生物专门在你身上搜查物品，则它可以尝试用察觉检定对抗你的隐秘DC（成功则找到该物品）。

你也可以把一个物件藏在你身上之外的地方，比如灌木丛或家具中的秘密夹层。在这种情况下，角色可以在一个区域中搜索，将察觉检定的结果与你的隐秘DC相比较来判定是否找到了该物件。

成功 该物件未被发现。

失败 搜查者找到了该物件。

Sabotage.name: 蓄意破坏 Sabotage
Sabotage.description:
You disrupt enemy tech to cover your tracks or gain a tactical advantage. Select a single tech creature or tech item within 15 feet that you can detect. If your target is a tech creature, attempt a @Check[computers|against:fortitude] check against the creature's Fortitude DC. If your target is a tech item, attempt a Computers check against the item's DC or the @Check[computers|against:reflex]{Reflex DC} of the creature possessing the item if the item is being carried, held, or worn.

If you're an expert in Computers, you can Sabotage a tech creature or tech item within 30 feet. If you're a master, this range increases to 45 feet. If you're legendary, this range increases to 60 feet.

Critical Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1} for 1 minute.

Success The target becomes glitching 1 for 2 rounds.

Failure Your attempt fails and requires more persistent analysis. The target is immune to your Sabotage until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure Your attempt backfires. The target is immune to your Sabotage for 10 minutes.

Arrest a Fall.name: 着陆 Arrest a Fall
Arrest a Fall.description:
触发 你处于坠落中。

需求 你拥有飞行速度。

你尝试一次特技或反射检定来缓冲坠落。DC通常为15，但根据风力风向或其它环境因素，DC可以被提高。

成功 你正常轻轻落地，不受到这次坠落伤害。

Telekinetic Sprint.name: Telekinetic Sprint
Telekinetic Sprint.description:
Frequency once per minute

Effect You gain a +5-foot status bonus to your Speeds until the end of your turn. You then Stride or Fly up to your Speed.

Dance Partner!.name: Dance Partner!
Dance Partner!.description:
Every good performer needs an accompanying act. Nominate yourself and an ally within 10 feet. Stride or Step, then your ally can Stride or Step as a reaction as long as they end the same distance or closer to you than they started.

Lead by Example If you used two actions, enemies are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to your Strikes if within reach of your selected ally, and vice-versa, until the start of your next turn. Your ally becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} against ranged Strikes made by creatures within 10 feet until the start of your next turn or the ally moves, whichever comes first.

Craft.name: 制作 Craft
Craft.description:
You can make an item from raw materials. You need the Serum Crafting skill feat to create medicinal items, the Magical Crafting skill feat to create magic items, and the Tech Crafting skill feat to create technological items.

To Craft an item, you must meet the following requirements:

  • The item is your level or lower. An item that doesn't list a level is level 0. If the item is 9th level or higher, you must be a master in Crafting, and if it's 17th or higher, you must be legendary.
  • The item must be common, or you must otherwise have access to it.
  • You have an appropriate set of tools and, in many cases, a workshop. For example, you need access to a machining shop to craft items with small parts made of metal or plastic, or a pharmaceutical lab to manufacture medicine. Many starships and Pact Worlds settlements have UPB printing kiosks you can use for this.
  • You must supply raw materials worth at least half the item's Price. You always expend at least that amount of raw materials when you Craft successfully. If you're in a settlement, you can usually spend currency to get the amount of raw materials you need, except in the case of rarer precious materials.

You attempt a Crafting check after you spend 2 days of work setting up, or 1 day if you have the item's formula. The GM determines the DC to Craft the item based on its level, rarity, and other circumstances.

If your attempt to create the item is successful, you expend the raw materials you supplied. You can pay the remaining portion of the item's Price in materials to complete the item immediately, or you can spend additional downtime days working on it. For each additional day you spend, reduce the value of the materials you need to expend to complete the item. This amount is determined using the Income Earned table, based on your proficiency rank in Crafting and using your own level instead of a task level.

After any of these downtime days, you can complete the item by spending the remaining portion of its Price in materials. If the downtime days you spend are interrupted, you can return to finish the item later, continuing where you left off.

Critical Success Your attempt is successful. Each additional day spent Crafting reduces the materials needed to complete the item by an amount based on your level + 1 and your proficiency rank in Crafting.

Success Your attempt is successful. Each additional day spent Crafting reduces the materials needed to complete the item by an amount based on your level and your proficiency rank.

Failure You fail to complete the item. You can salvage the raw materials you supplied for their full value. If you want to try again, you must start over.

Critical Failure You fail to complete the item. You ruin 10% of the raw materials you supplied, but you can salvage the rest. If you want to try again, you must start over.

Aim.name: Aim
Aim.description:
Requirements You're wielding a ranged weapon that doesn't have the area trait.

You take careful aim at a single creature that you're aware of, designating it as your mark until your next turn. Your ranged Strikes against your mark using the required ranged weapon deal an additional 1d4 precision damage and reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 1. These benefits only apply if your mark is within your weapon's first range increment. You can only have one mark at a time.

As your operative level increases, so does your ability to Aim. Increase the number of dice for the precision damage by one at 5th, 11th, and 17th levels. At 11th level, you reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 2 rather than 1. At 17th level, you reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 4 rather than 2.

Point Out.name: 指出位置 Point Out
Point Out.description:
需求 有生物对一个或更多你的盟友而言为无踪状态，但对你不为无踪。

你对你一个或更多盟友说你能看到某个生物，并指出其方向和说出其距离。该生物对你的盟友不再为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{无踪 Undetected}状态，而改为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}状态。这只对能看到你且所处位置能侦测到目标的盟友有效。若盟友无法听到你或听懂你说的话，他们必须通过察觉检定对抗所指出位置生物的隐秘技能DC，否则会被误导认为目标在别的位置。

Research.name: 研究 Research
Research.description:
你彻底疏理资讯，对手边的课题深入领悟。选择你的研究课题，图书馆区域或依据研究形式的其他区分方式，然后尝试技能检定。使用的技能，检定的DC，取决于具体的研究任务，且研究行动将获得与研究类型相匹配的特征（例如在查阅书籍时获得语言特征）。

大成功 你获得2RP。

成功 你获得1RP。

大失败 你发现的东西是错的，还失去1RP。

Coerce.name: 胁迫 Coerce
Coerce.description:
你使用明里或暗里的威胁来胁迫一个生物按你的意愿行事。你必须话至少1分钟时间与该生物交谈。对话结束时，进行[[/act coerce]]检定对抗目标的意志DC，GM可以决定附加任意环境加值。

大成功 目标向你吐露你想要的信息，或同意遵循你的指令，只要该指令不会以任何方式伤害到目标。目标会在GM决定的时间里继续遵守指令，但不会超过1天，之后目标的态度变为不友善（如果之前还未变为不友善或敌对）。然而目标会因为太过害怕你而不敢采取报复行动，至少短期内是这样。

成功 类似大成功，但只要目标变为不友善，他们就可能会决定对你采取行动，比如向官方机构举报你或者是帮助你的敌人。

失败 目标不会按照你说的去做，如果他们之前态度还未变为不友善或敌对，现在就会变为不友善。

大失败 目标拒绝服从，如果他们之前态度还未变为敌对，现在就会变为敌对，并且至少在1周内暂时免疫你的胁迫。

改变态度 Changing Attitudes

你对NPC的影响由态度衡量，这也体现了他们如何看待你的角色。当然这也只是对这个生物个性的简要总结。GM会根据与你互动角色的历史和信仰引入一些细微差别，这些角色的态度可能会随着故事推进而变化。状态附录中详细说明了各种态度的含义，这里也会对其简要总结。

  • 乐于帮助 Helpful: 愿意帮助你，会积极回应你的请求。
  • 友善 Friendly: 对你态度很好，但不一定会主动上门来帮助你。
  • 不关心 Indifferent: 你或好或坏他都不在乎。（大多数NPC的起始态度为不关心。）
  • 不友善 Unfriendly: 不喜欢你，也不愿意帮助你。
  • 敌对 Hostile: 会积极反对你，可能仅仅因为不喜欢就攻击你。

用这些技能无法改变玩家的态度。你可以与玩家角色进行角色扮演互动，如果玩家愿意，你也可以使用交涉掷骰的结果让他们对一个角色的说服力或魅力有个大致了解，但玩家会对自己角色的反应做出最终决定。

Follow the Expert.name: 跟随专家 Follow the Expert
Follow the Expert.description:
选择一名在探索模式期间尝试反复进行技能检定的盟友（如攀爬的时候）或执行其他需要技能的探索战术的盟友（比如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoiding Notice}）。该盟友必须在该技能达到专家熟练度，并且愿意为你提供帮助。在跟随专家期间，你会与她们的战术相配合或尝试类似的技能检定。

得益于盟友的帮助，你可以在相关的技能检定上加上熟练加值，数值与你的等级相同，即便你在该技能上未受训也如此。此外，基于该盟友的熟练度，你还会在技能检定上获得环境加值（专家+2，大师+3，传奇+4）。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.VCSpuc3Tf3XWMkd3]{效果：跟随专家}

Umbral Stride.name: Umbral Stride
Umbral Stride.description:
Frequency once per round

Requirements You're in dim light or darkness.

You can move between shadows as though you were taking a normal step. You teleport up to 30 feet. The destination must be in dim light or darkness and must be within your line of sight and line of effect.

Drive.name: 驾驶 Drive
Drive.description:
需求 你正在驾驶一辆载具

你驾驶你的载具来移动。在移动前，决定你准备在驾驶上使用几个动作。驾驶效果取决于消耗的动作数量。你无法驾驶通过被其他生物占据的空间，即便他们是你的盟友。

1 尝试一次驾驶检定。成功时，载具移动等同于其移动速度的距离，可以正常转向。失败时，载具直线移动等同于其移动速度的距离。大失败时，载具直线以东等于其移动速度的距离，并且失去控制。

2 （鲁莽） 载具向着当前行进方向，直线移动等于两倍其移动速度的距离。

3 （鲁莽） 你进行一次-5的驾驶检定，以维持对载具的控制。载具向着当前行进方向，直线移动等于三倍其移动速度的距离。

Take Cover.name: 寻找掩蔽 Take Cover
Take Cover.description:
需求 你处于标准掩蔽中、邻接能让你寻找掩蔽的事物、处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}状态中

你将身体蜷缩在墙后或障碍物后面，使自己更好地利用掩蔽（第424页）。若你已有标准掩蔽，你改为获得高等掩蔽，这会给AC提供+4环境加值；给对抗区域效果的反射豁免+4环境加值；给[[/act hide]]、[[/act sneak]]和其它避开侦查的隐秘检定提供+4环境加值。其他情况，你获得标准掩蔽（改为+2环境加值）。如果你处于倒地状态，你对于远程攻击获得高等掩蔽。寻找掩蔽持续到你离开当前空间、使用攻击动作、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}、或者用自由动作结束该效果。

Re-Forge Solar Weapon.name: Re-Forge Solar Weapon
Re-Forge Solar Weapon.description:
You spend 10 minutes focusing on the composition of your solar weapon. You can change your solar weapon's damage type (typically choosing between bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing), selected traits, and weapon group. Your weapon maintains your selections until the next time you Re-Forge Solar Weapon.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{Effect: Solar Weapon}

Shielding Arrogance.name: Shielding Arrogance
Shielding Arrogance.description:
Frequency once per hour

Trigger A creature other than you within range of your thoughtsense becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied}, or takes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.lDVqvLKA6eF3Df60]{persistent mental damage}

Effect You can attempt an extra flat check immediately to end any persistent mental damage effect you have, and you reduce the flat check DC to 10. You then gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level. These temporary Hit Points last 1 minute.

Release.name: 放开 Release
Release.description:
你放开你正用手握着的某些事物。这可以是丢下某物品、双手持握时松开一只手而另一只手依然握住、攀爬中松开抓住的绳索、等等类似动作。和大多数操作特征的动作不同，放开不会触发那些会因操作特征而被触发的反应动作（例如反应打击）。

若你想要在回合外使用放开这个动作，请使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.dLgAMt3TbkmLkUqE]{准备 Ready} 动作。

Operate Device.name: Operate Device
Operate Device.description:
Requirements You are using a computer or similar device.

You perform a basic task using a digital device, such as operating a basic program or playing a vidgame. You might also use this if the device you're using has a physical component, such as 3D-tracking or requiring specific motions to activate features. The GM determines the DC based on the action you're taking.

Critical Success You excel at what you are doing, learning secrets from the program or advanced functionality. If it's a game, then you win it with record timing based on average completion rates.

Success You manage to operate the device in the necessary manner, including getting basic functionality. You gain general information from the program.

Failure You can't understand the program or game and take a –2 circumstance penalty to further attempts to access or play it for the next day.

Critical Failure You fail to access the game or make a mistake that prevents you from accessing the program (such as forgetting a password and locking yourself out of the program) for the next day.

Raise a Shield.name: 举起盾牌 Raise a Shield
Raise a Shield.description:
需求 你正持握盾牌。

你举起盾牌保护自己。当你举起盾牌时，你将盾牌所列的环境加值添加到自己的AC上。你的盾牌会一直保持举起直到你的下一回合开始。

Dragon Breath (Dragon Form).name: 龙息（巨龙形态） Dragon Breath (Dragon Form)
Dragon Breath (Dragon Form).description: 你向一个区域内呼出致命的魔法能量，对区域中每个生物造成@Damage[10d6[untyped]|options:area-damage]伤害，这有一次基础豁免，对抗你的法术DC。形态、伤害类型和豁免类型与你选择的龙的吐息攻击对应。如果选择的龙的吐息能造成多余一种伤害类型，当你施放巨龙形态时选择一种。该形状为@Template[type:cone|distance:30]或者@Template[type:line|distance:100]。在启动后，龙息在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Dragon Breath]]{1d4轮}内不能再被使用。龙息具有和对应龙类型的根源特征，以对应其伤害类型的伤害特征，如果适用。

Recharge.name: Recharge
Recharge.description:
Requirements You have a battery.

You recharge an expended battery. This takes 1 minute if using a charging station, which can be found in most buildings and starships.

New Plan.name: New Plan
New Plan.description:
Trigger An ally you reviewed stratagems with is about to attempt an attack roll or skill check

Effect The ally rolls the triggering check twice and takes the better of the two results. That ally then becomes temporarily immune to your New Plan until your next daily preparations.

Take Control.name: 接管 Take Control
Take Control.description:
Requirements You are aboard the vehicle and adjacent to its controls.

You grab the wheel or some other mechanism in order to control the vehicle. Attempt a piloting check; on a success, you become the vehicle's pilot, or regain control of the vehicle if it was uncontrolled. Some vehicles have complicated controls that cause this action to become a multi-action activity.
